t_ch: 你看着它消融的身体，打趣地想着：下次该为它们准备些*下酒佐餐*…
t_en: Watching its body melt, a fun idea pops up in your head: You should prepare some "appetizers" to go with the course you just fed it next time...

t_ch: 你失败了！你一脚滑到了「古脑体」面前！
t_en: You've failed! You slip and fall right in front of the *ancient brain*!

t_ch: 你只好用莫洛托斯鸡尾酒制成的燃烧瓶作掩护撤退…前功尽弃了！一边撤退一边想，接下来又得从头再来…可恶！
t_en: You have no choice but to cover your retreat with a Molotov cocktail... All your previous effort has gone down the drain! While retreating, the thought of having to start everything over leaves you frustrated!

t_ch: 一位狐人舞者来到你面前。她狡黠地对你使了一个嘘的手势，接着为你掀开「会堂」的门帘。
t_en: A foxian dancer approaches you. She makes a mischievous shushing gesture at you before lifting the curtain to the hall for you.

t_ch: 「这七盏塘香前，跪拜着寰宇无数日笃癫狂的舞者。他们在会堂前叩首，对那已是第十三位自缢者进行唱谣祷告。舞者团匍匐于神前…恳求得知自己在宇宙之舞结束后的结局。」
t_en: "Before these seven pots of incense kneel countless dancers from all over the stars, who are getting madder by the day. They prostrate themselves before the meeting hall, and sing and pray to the <unbreak>13</unbreak>th self-strangler - there are already <unbreak>13</unbreak> of them. The dancers will lie prone before God, pleading to know their end after the cosmic dance ends."

t_ch: 「一张命运符纸，若不信就是个银河瞩目的谣言。」
t_en: "Here's a talisman about your fate. If you don't believe this type of thing, just treat it as a famous rumor of the cosmos."

t_ch: 沾满不明血液的符纸摆在你的面前…你对此十分不屑，完全不为所动。你压根不信命……
t_en: A talisman stained with blood from an unknown source is placed before you... You regard it contemptuously and remain completely unimpressed. In your opinion, there is no such thing as fate...

t_ch: 你的内心开始蠢蠢欲动……
t_en: Deep down inside, you are tempted...

t_ch: 你抹去了符纸上的血液，上面写着：安慰。你十分失望……
t_en: You wipe the blood off the talisman on which it reads: "Consolation." You are very disappointed...

t_ch: 还要再来一次吗？
t_en: Ready for another one?

t_ch: 你抹去了符纸上的血液，上面写着：安慰。你开始怀疑这是否是场骗局……
t_en: You wipe the blood off the talisman on which it reads: "Consolation." You begin to wonder whether this is a scam...

t_ch: 还要再来一次吗？
t_en: Ready for another one?

t_ch: 难以置信——你的双手颤抖着，你的热泪从眼眶溢出。一生作为「数据分母」的你从未想过，你会得到如此*曼妙*的体验，你甚至怀疑这一切都是模拟的——
t_en: This is unbelievable... Your hands are trembling, and tears are streaming down your face. Being an unlucky dog all your life, you never expected to experience something as *wonderful* as this. You even wonder if everything is still just a simulation...

t_ch: 你居然真的得到了命运的启发。上面写着：「终末」的揭晓…
t_en: Surprisingly, you have received a genuine revelation from fate. The talisman reads: "The Revelation of Finality..."

t_ch: 你还未读完，便因激动昏了过去。
t_en: You pass out from excitement before you can finish reading it.

t_ch: 吉巴欧萝卜先生！又是你。恭喜你，你发现了像素世界的隐藏关卡！
t_en: Mr. Jibaou the radish! Glad to see you again. Congratulations on discovering the hidden stage of the Pixel World!

t_ch: 这个隐藏关卡将使你怀疑人生！
t_en: This hidden stage will make you question your life choices!

t_ch: 现在你已没有任何别的办法渡过面前的湍急流水。你的面前有三朵巨大的*食人鱼*！你只能赌一只其中看上去最*友善*的食人鱼跳进它的胃里，来助你渡过这片河…当然，如果你选错，也很可能葬身鱼腹。
t_en: Now, you have no other means to cross the rapid stream, and there are three massive piranhas before you! You can only bet your life on a piranha that appears the friendliest and jump into its stomach to let it carry you across the river... Of course, you might perish in its belly if you make the wrong choice.

t_ch: 你的博弈成功了！
t_en: You make the right choice!

t_ch: 你呆在食人鱼的胃里等待着漂流过海…你暗自想着：它不爱吃萝卜，对此你很庆幸。等抵达岸上，就即刻储存进度吧！
t_en: You stay in the piranha's stomach, waiting to cross the sea... You think to yourself, "Luckily, it doesn't eat carrots." Save your progress immediately when you reach the other side!

t_ch: 「你来了——欢迎来到『机械城』的 『认知理发馆』。」咔戎把头发简单地束起，指节轻敲了酒吧桌面两下，「在这里我们可以调整『自我认知』。你可以成为你想成为的任何东西，对吗？哦，看看你身边那位博士。」
t_en: "Welcome to the Cogito Hair Salon of the Mechanical City!" Charon ties up their hair and taps twice on the bar table with their knuckles. "We can adjust 'Intra-Cognition' here. You can become whatever you want to be, no? Oh, just look at that doctor next to you."

t_ch: 你打量着身边这位新的*访客*。
t_en: You size up the new *guest* beside you.

t_ch: No.5博士正被咔戎剪着头发，他沉浸其中，完全没注意到咔戎在剪的是他的胡须。他开始侃侃而谈，「你知道如何提升自己的『知识』吗？」
t_en: Dr. No.5 is enjoying Charon's hair-cutting service so much that he does not even realize Charon is cutting his beard. He speaks confidently, "Do you know how to improve the extent of your knowledge?"

t_ch: 「博识学会时常会开展有关『天才俱乐部』的议论与探讨，我也常在集会中论证自己是『天才』。我通过实验，将善与恶融为一体——我如此『善恶兼容』。」博士说，「更厉害的是，我尝试用药液分离两者！如果是你，你会选择哪一种？」
t_en: "The Intelligentsia Guild engages in discussions regarding the Genius Society from time to time, during which I often present arguments to prove myself to be a genius. Through experiments, I've blended good and evil into one to show that I'm compatible with both." Says the doctor. "Even better, I've also tried separating them using a potion! Which of the two would you choose?"

t_ch: 「没错。实验成功后，善的我占据了身体的主导权。」他大笑着，「通过这样『癫狂』的求知，可以打开通往更自由、更高阶意识的状态！」
t_en: "That's right. After the experiment succeeded, my good self took over my body." He guffaws, "Through such a deranged pursuit of knowledge, we can reach a more liberated and higher-dimensional consciousness!"

t_ch: 「嗯，无所谓。实验成功后，恶的我占据了身体的主导权。」他大笑着，「通过这样『癫狂』的求知，可以打开通往更自由、更高阶意识的状态！」
t_en: "Well, it doesn't matter. After the experiment succeeded, my evil self took over my body." He guffaws, "Through such a deranged pursuit of knowledge, we can reach a more liberated and higher-dimensional consciousness!"

t_ch: 「总有一天，『博识尊』会看到我！」他继续说着，似乎已经陷入癫狂，「但『真理医生』却认为我是个白痴——他看谁都这样！如果有天你遇到他，记得做出你的选择。不不不——你现在就得做出选择！」
t_en: "One day, Nous will notice me!" He continues as if hysterical, "But Dr. Ratio thinks I'm an idiot — he sees everybody that way! If you ever meet him, remember to make your choice. No, no, no... You'd better make the choice right now!"

t_ch: 你看着博士在两种形态间不断转化，最后在绝望与苦恼下自尽，他在两面性的旋转中变成一枚*机械陀螺*，最终在永恒的旋转中终结了自己矛盾的一生。
t_en: You watch the doctor constantly shift between two states and ultimately kill himself in despair and frustration. He has transformed into a *mechanical spinning top* in the spiral between polar opposites, and his conflicted life ends in an eternal spin between his two facets.

t_ch: 「记得，如果有天遇到真理医生——」他留下遗言，「先告诉他谁才是*白痴*！」
t_en: "Remember, if you ever meet Dr. Ratio... you must first tell him who is the true *idiot*!" He speaks his last word.

t_ch: 「好，都来齐啰。」黑塔清了清嗓子，「我们终于相聚在机械城的 『认知理发馆』了！虽然是模拟的。现在来理发吧。噢，抱歉，在理发过程中，我们总得聊点什么。」
t_en: "Alright, everyone is here." Herta clears her throat and says, "We've finally gathered at the Cogito Hair Salon in the Mechanical City, though it's just a simulation! Now, let's get a haircut. Oops, sorry, we've got to talk about something while getting our hair done."

t_ch: 「逻辑：模拟宇宙的旅程需要时刻确认自我认知。」螺丝咕姆说，「{NICKNAME}，我们好奇你的自我认知在这场奇妙旅途中是否有所改变。如果测试使你的自我认知发生动摇，你将相信自己是一台『机器』，这是我们所不愿看到的。」
t_en: "Affirmation: We need to constantly reaffirm our Intra-Cognition during our journey in the Simulated Universe," says Screwllum. "{NICKNAME}, we wonder whether your Intra-Cognition has changed during this wonderful trip. If your Intra-Cognition is swayed by the test, you'll see yourself as a machine, and that's not what we hope to see."

t_ch: 「结论：一些回忆浮现。」螺丝咕姆微笑道，陷入沉思，「时间回到很早之前，有机和无机还未对立，只是，他们有时会陷入『不分你我』的状态。」他从口袋中掏出几枚元件，「这是枚情感『元件』——一些机械生灵友人，它们都住在元件里。挑一个作为纪念品吧。」
t_en: "Conclusion: Some memories have resurfaced." Screwllum smiles and sinks deep in thought. "Once upon a time, when the organic and inorganic lives were not at odds, they would sometimes find themselves hardly distinguishable." He fishes out several components from his pocket. "These are emotional components, and some of my machine friends reside within them. You can pick one as your souvenir."

t_ch: 「你来了——欢迎来到『机械城』的 『认知理发馆』。」服务员咔戎把头发简单地束起，指节轻敲了桌面两下，「在这里我们可以调整『自我认知』。你可以成为你想成为的任何东西，对吗？」
t_en: "Welcome to the Cogito Hair Salon of the Mechanical City!" Charon ties up their hair and taps twice on the bar table with their knuckles. "We can adjust 'Intra-Cognition' here. You can become whatever you want to be, no?"

t_ch: 「哦，看看你身边那位机械女士。它可以教你提升自己的『魅力』，或是『智力』。一切看你的选择。」
t_en: "Oh, look at that mechanical lady next to you. They can teach you how to improve up your charisma or intelligence. It's all up to your choices."

t_ch: 「好啊，我来为你传授。实际上，『智力』不过是从绝对的*经验*中总结出逻辑。我想现在的大家都太过高估理性，当你掌握绝对的*经验*，就可以超越自我的限制。」
t_en: "Let me teach you a thing or two. In actuality, intelligence is nothing but logic derived from absolute *experience*. I think people nowadays overestimate reason. When you have absolute *experience*, you'll be able to go beyond the limits of the self."

t_ch: 「我已经遗忘*自我*了。很快，我就要扬升登神！」机械咕母一边理着头发，一边骄傲地说，星球碎片变成她耳上的碎钻闪闪发光，它准备好*一飞冲天*。
t_en: "I've already forgotten my *self*. Soon, I'll ascend to become a god!" Screwllita declares proudly as they fix their hair, as fragments of planets turn into glittering diamonds on their ears. They are ready to soar into the sky.

t_ch: 「好啊，让我为你传授。我想『魅力』就是简化事物。越简单纯粹，按照自我想法行事，魅力就将越璀璨夺目。当你掌握绝对的*置若罔闻*，就可以超越自我的限制。」
t_en: "Let me teach you a thing or two. I think charisma is all about making things simple. The simpler you are and the more you do things your way, the more charismatic you'll be. When you exhibit absolute *indifference*, you'll be able to do beyond the limits of the self."

t_ch: 「我已经遗忘*自我*了。很快，我就要扬升登神！」机械咕母一边理着头发，一边骄傲地说，星球碎片变成它耳上的碎钻闪闪发光，它准备好*一飞冲天*。
t_en: "I've already forgotten my *self*. Soon, I'll ascend to become a god!" Screwllita declares proudly as they fix their hair, as fragments of planets turn into glittering diamonds on their ears. They are ready to soar into the sky.

t_ch: 说着说着…这位顾客的头发理好，它便在你眼前飞走了。
t_en: Soon, their hair is done. They then fly away before your eyes.

t_ch: 「一只陷入*自我*主义中的机械昆虫。」咔戎收起剪刀，悲哀地说，「快把它忘了罢。倒是有些它收集的宝石会遗留下来，赠予理发馆，挑一个纪念品带走吧。」
t_en: "It's a mechanical bug trapped in *egoism*." Charon puts away their scissors and says despondently. "You should forget about them. Some of the gems they collected were left behind and gifted to the Hair Salon. You can pick one as a keepsake."

t_ch: 一位「骇客」突然闯进了你全神投入的游戏屏幕——它由数据汇成的模样逐渐成型，这是一只蓝色头发的生命。它摇摆着自己蓝色的头发，对你笑了笑。
t_en: A "hacker" suddenly invades the screen as you are engrossed in the video game you are playing. The congregating data form it takes gradually solidifies — it appears to be a blue-haired being. It sways its blue hair and flashes you a smile.

t_ch: 「我尝试复制黑塔女士的奇物。」它说，「别问我是谁，这只是我的虚拟形象。给你些宝贝…不过和普通的奇物不太一样。你得先付出代价，才能有收获。」
t_en: "I'm trying to replicate Madam Herta's Curios. Don't ask me who I am. This is just my virtual avatar. I'll offer you something nice... but they're different to how normal Curios work. You have to pay the price first before you get the rewards," it says.

t_ch: 你要接受吗？
t_en: Do you want to take the deal?

t_ch: 你看着眼前的图景：黑森林在下雨，每片叶子上都挂着露水。这雨令你感到哀伤。
t_en: You look at the scene before you: It is raining in the Black Forest, and there are dew drops on every leaf. The rain saddens you.

t_ch: 你在黑森林淋着小雨，一路兜兜转转，走到路边的铁匠铺旁。一台制造机正痴迷于制作火漆，它专心于敲着手中的小锤子——直到你的到来打断了它。
t_en: You wander around in the Black Forest amid the drizzle and arrive at a blacksmith's store by the roadside. A machine is immersed in churning out sealing wax and hammering away in full concentration until your presence interrupts its work.

t_ch: 「你想问我火漆的事吗？」它目光如炬。
t_en: "Do you want to ask me about the sealing wax?" It has a penetrating gaze.

t_ch: 「再过百年，我依然在这里生产火漆。」制造机说道，接着继续埋头锤它的小锤子。
t_en: "I'll still be making sealing wax here for another <unbreak>100</unbreak> years," the manufacturing machine says, and then gets back to its hammer.

t_ch: 「我是个商业贩子，这是一个神秘的盒子。」星际和平投资机器满不在乎地说，「我的肚子是一个机械口袋，里面有很多数据模拟的『宇宙碎片』。」
t_en: "I'm a peddler, and this is a mysterious box." The Interastral Peace Investment Device explains nonchalantly. "My belly is a mechanical pocket that stores a lot of data-simulated Cosmic Fragments."

t_ch: 「我们以*信任*为资源进行投资。」星际和平投资机器打开它的肚子，里面放着一些模拟合成的『宇宙碎片』，「我保证，越多的*信任*，将获得越多的回报。」
t_en: "*Trust* is the resource we use to invest." The Interastral Peace Investment Device opens its belly and shows the simulated and synthesized Cosmic Fragments inside. "I promise you'll get higher returns the more *trust* you have."

t_ch: 你还要继续相信星际和平投资机吗？
t_en: Will you continue to trust the Interastral Peace Investment Device?

t_ch: 你等待着星际和平投资机器打开它的*肚子*…但它纹丝未动。
t_en: You wait for the Interastral Peace Investment Device to open its *belly*... but it stays motionless.

t_ch: 你意识到自己这次上当了！你一无所获。
t_en: You realize you have been duped! You gain nothing.

t_ch: 星际和平投资机器打开它的*肚子*…你成功了！
t_en: The Interastral Peace Investment Device opens its *belly*... You have succeeded!

t_ch: 你获得了丰厚的*投资*回报！
t_en: You get a great return on your *investment*!

t_ch: 星际和平投资机器打开它的*肚子*…你成功了！
t_en: The Interastral Peace Investment Device opens its *belly*... You have succeeded!

t_ch: 你获得了丰厚的*投资*回报！
t_en: You get a great return on your *investment*!

t_ch: 你等待着星际和平投资机器打开它的*肚子*…但它纹丝未动。
t_en: You wait for the Interastral Peace Investment Device to open its *belly*... but it stays motionless.

t_ch: 你意识到自己这次上当了！你肝肠寸断。
t_en: You realize you have been duped! You are inconsolable.

t_ch: 你来到了夫莱昂机械联盟的停泊港湾。这里有一个大埠口，遍布各类机械招待员。
t_en: You arrive at the docking bay of the Freon Mechanical Alliance. It is a vast harbor with mechanical attendants everywhere.

t_ch: 一位机械招待员带你走上台阶…你发现这台阶是由一条条机械手臂托举而成的。你一直向前，直到离开港湾，看见「星际和平机械分部商城」的招牌。
t_en: A mechanical attendant leads you up a staircase, which you notice is formed by numerous mechanical arms. You keep going until you leave the harbor and see the sign of "Interastral Peace Mechanical Branch Shopping Mall."

t_ch: 这里的装修风格十分有公司派头…你来到了柜台前。
t_en: The place is renovated in a style very much iconic to the IPC... You walk up to the counter.

t_ch: 「我们卖东西，在埠口价格会实惠些。就这样。」机械职员懒得说太多，示意你自己选。
t_en: "We sell our stuff cheaper at the port. That's it." The mechanical staff doesn't bother to explain too much — a signal for you to make your own choice.

t_ch: 你又一次来到了夫莱昂机械联盟的停泊港湾，一位机械招待员带你走上台阶…你发现这台阶是由一条条机械手臂托举而成的，你在上面走得摇摇晃晃。你一直向前，直到看见「星际和平机械分部商城」的招牌。
t_en: Once again, you arrive at the docking bay of the Freon Mechanical Alliance. A mechanical attendant leads you up a staircase, which you notice is formed by numerous mechanical arms. You wobble as you walk on it. You keep going until you see the sign of "Interastral Peace Mechanical Branch Shopping Mall."

t_ch: 你对这景象很熟悉…你来到了柜台前。
t_en: The scene is familiar to you... You walk up to the counter.

t_ch: 「机械城分部，如果手里有好东西，就拿来升级吧。」机械职员懒得说太多，示意你自己选。
t_en: "This is the Mechanical Branch. You can bring your good stuff here and upgrade them." The mechanical staff doesn't bother to explain too much — a signal for you to make your own choice.

t_ch: 你很想对它的脑袋来上狠狠一拳…但你忍住了这种欲望。
t_en: You feel like punching its head... but you manage to hold the urge back.

t_ch: 「欢迎来到圣多明戈城！我们倒卖作弊代码。」这位机械招待满不在乎地说，「你小时候一定热衷的那种。但我们这儿的不一样，这里是圣多明戈之城版本。」
t_en: "Welcome to the city of St. Domingo! We sell cheat codes here." The mechanical attendant explains without a care in the world. "The kind you were definitely crazy about when you were little. What we have is slightly different, as they are the St. Domingo version."

t_ch: 「随便你怎么用，只要不被机械警察抓到。」它咯咯地笑了。
t_en: "Use it any way you want. Just make sure you don't get caught by the mechacops," it giggles.

t_ch: 你浅尝辄止。
t_en: You try it out briefly.

t_ch: 你小心翼翼。
t_en: You are careful with it.

t_ch: 你进行了一场豪赌！谁知道以后会发生什么呢？
t_en: You make a bold gamble! Who knows what will happen next?

t_ch: 你漫步在圣多明戈城…这里的灯光璀璨夺目。正当你沉浸其中时，你的右肩被拍了一下——你诧异地回头，接着左臂就立刻被擒住。
t_en: You are taking a stroll in the city of St. Domingo... Dazzling lights are everywhere. As you are mesmerized by the brilliance, someone taps on your right shoulder. You turn around in surprise, and your left arm is clasped the next second.

t_ch: 「你好。」一位圣多明戈机械警察向你鞠了个躬，「走一趟吧。证据：您之前的『作弊代码』已被记录在案。」
t_en: "Hello." A St. Domingo mechacop bows to you and says, "Please come with me. Evidence: Your previous usage of cheat codes have been documented."

t_ch: 你找到一只落单的虫群幼崽。它蜷缩在阿纳洛星球的丛林深处，三双复眼可怜巴巴地望着你，牙齿叩击出清脆的啼哭，四散的孢子更叫人心跳加速。
t_en: You find a lone swarm juvenile. It is huddling in the jungle depths of planet Anaru, looking up at you with pity in its three pairs of compound eyes as its teeth clack out a crisp cry. Its scattered spores cause your heart to start racing.

t_ch: 瞧瞧它稚嫩的口器，从诞生的那天开始就没进食过一点东西。这么天真可爱的小家伙，谁能忍心看它活活地受冻挨饿？
t_en: You look at its tender mouthparts. It has never had anything to eat since the day it was born. Who could bear to see such a cute and innocent little guy suffer from the cold and hunger?

t_ch: 虽然投喂野生动物有违自然规律，但反正也没人看见…要不，悄悄喂它点垃圾？
t_en: Despite the feeding of wild animals being illegal, nobody is going to see anything, right? So how about secretly feeding it some trash?

t_ch: 幼虫在奇物的影响下骤然变异，巨大的怪物发出威吓，张牙舞爪地扑向你。
t_en: The larva suddenly mutates under the influence of the Curio, and a huge monster lets out a threatening roar before baring tooth and claw to pounce on you.

t_ch: 幼虫在奇物的影响下不断地膨胀、变异，蜕去的外壳一次次地炸开，直到整片丛林的天空都被它遮蔽。
t_en: The larva continues to swell and mutate under the influence of the Curio, its molted shell exploding again and again until the entire jungle sky is covered up by it.

t_ch: 幼虫在奇物的影响下迅速成长，鞘翅破开乳白的外皮，分裂成复数的个体向你袭来。
t_en: The larva rapidly grows under the influence of the Curio. Its wings break through the milky-white skin and split into several independent units which begin attacking you.

t_ch: 青幽色的火焰将无名客的列车吞没，车厢里传来一阵无比熟悉的奸笑，徘徊的阴冷气息让你不由得后背发寒。
t_en: Dark-green flames engulf the Express. An extremely familiar, evil sneer booms out from the carriage, and the shimmering cold air makes the hairs stick up on the back of your neck.

t_ch: 「好久不见，小虫子，没想到吧，我成功逃出来了。」抬头望去，浮烟的大眼睛正死死地瞪着你，愤怒和傲慢以两种焰色在其中猛烈地燃烧。
t_en: "Long time no see, little bug. Didn't think I'd actually escape, did you?" You look up to see Cirrus staring at you wide-eyed, angry and arrogant flames burning violently in those eyes.

t_ch: 也不知道这段数据是上哪儿找来的，你总感觉模拟出来的版本比本体还要欠揍。
t_en: Who knows where this data came from. You always feel as though the simulated version is worse than the original.

t_ch: 「还记得我说过的吗？无名客和仙舟对我的侮辱，今天就要你们加倍偿还！」大岁阳狂妄地叫嚣道。
t_en: "Remember what I said? Today, you will pay double for the insults imparted on me by the Nameless and the Xianzhou!" shrieked the great heliobus hysterically.

t_ch: 你走进冉比希星的废品回收站，成千上万的垃圾桶在垃圾堆里喝彩欢呼。
t_en: Walking into the recycling station on the Rumbas system, you hear thousands upon thousands of trash dumps cheering from inside the garbage pile.

t_ch: 作为第二十一届垃圾厨王争霸赛的擂主，反观测护罩、吃剩一半的天环翅堡、未知星球的硬币，观众扔下垃圾来代替花束，表达对你的期待。
t_en: As ring master of the <unbreak>21</unbreak>st Garbage Chef Championship, you view the observation shield, half-eaten Halovian Winged Burgers, currency from an unknown system, as well as the garbage thrown from the audience instead of flowers, as an expression of their hopes for you.

t_ch: 你淡然地瞥向身边的挑战者，塔塔洛夫的宫廷大厨埃罗琳，尝遍一千种垃圾的分子食客瑞赛可，还有举世闻名的垃圾美食家贾克佛，全都是些难缠的家伙。
t_en: You casually glance around at the challengers: Tatalov's palace chef, Erolyn, the molecular eater Risaac, who's tasted a thousand kinds of garbage, and the world-famous garbage gourmand Jacques Feaux. Every one of them is a demanding prospect.

t_ch: 然而，在你的脑海内，胜利的菜单已然敲定。
t_en: And yet, in your mind, the menu for victory has already been decided.

t_ch: 「嚯，好狂妄的后生。」几位评委一跃而上，观众们擦干净盖子，准备见证垃圾厨艺界这史诗级的对决。
t_en: "Wow, what an arrogant youngster." Several referees jump forth, and the audience wipe their lids clean — preparing to witness an epic showdown in the world of garbage cuisine.

t_ch: 「吁——吁！」观众纷纷喝出倒彩，挑战者们更是怒不可遏，准备给你点颜色瞧瞧。
t_en: "Whoa... boo!" jeer the audience as the challengers grow furious, preparing to teach you a lesson.

t_ch: 有骨气！听了你的话，三位对手纷纷严阵以待，决定以自己最高的水准来表达对你的尊重。
t_en: You've got guts! After hearing what you have to say, three fighters get ready to fight and decide to express their respect for you at the highest level.

t_ch: 你坐在满是油污的蒸汽甲板上，眼前宛如图层错乱的桅杆让你一时有些眩晕，瑞勒号的船长站在你的身边，声音是这块乱码唯一接近人类的地方。
t_en: You are sitting on the oil-stained steam deck, and the deranged layers of all the masts stacked before you leave you feeling slightly dizzy. The captain of the Riviera is standing beside you, and his voice is the only thing approximating something human out of all this hot mess.

t_ch: 对图珀王国的征讨即将开始，溅起的海浪在顷刻间变得光怪陆离。二进制海洋的干涉让瑞勒号颠簸不断，但仍无法阻止伟大的三进制军团对它发起同化。
t_en: Conquest of the Tupah Kingdom is about to commence, and the spattering waves grow bizarre within seconds. The binary ocean's interference makes the Riviera somewhat bumpy, but cannot stop the great Trinary Legion from assimilating it.

t_ch: 「新来的机修工，控制室好像出了点问题，赶紧去处理处理。」你左顾右盼，确认他嘴里的「机修工」指的是你。
t_en: "Hey, new mechanic — something's broken in the control room. Go fix it, fast!" You look around, just to be sure that this "mechanic" he's talking about is in fact you.

t_ch: 走到控制室的尽头，三台故障严重的同化单元瘫倒在一起，你将大脑连接进另一个位面，以完成复杂的三进制演算。
t_en: Walking to the end of the control room, you find three severely broken assimilation units all bricked together. You hook up your brain to another plane and complete complex trinary extrapolations.

t_ch: 霓虹辉映的地下斗兽场里，封闭的高墙逐渐升起，来自银河各地的两百支达达球队抛接着手里的粉色小球，跃跃欲试。
t_en: Beneath the neon lights of the underground boxing arena, high walls gradually rise up out of the enclosure as some two hundred Dahdah teams from all over the cosmos toss a pink ball in their hands, eager to give things a whirl.

t_ch: 在烛墨学派的记录中，这种运动的危险程度仅次于伊斯特邦联的好孩子愤怒板球。
t_en: Among the Candelagraphos' records, this sport remains second only to the Isthmian Confederation's angry cricket matches in terms of danger.

t_ch: 「秉承以和为贵的精神，伟大的乐子神创造了达达球。」喇叭里的人捏着鼻子说道，「它用球类撞击替代了肢体冲突，每位选手都能享受比赛的乐趣。」
t_en: "Abiding by the spirit of valuing peace, the almighty Laughter created Dahdah ball." Pinching her nose, the person on the loudspeaker says, "It uses ball collisions in lieu of physical clashes. Every player gets to have fun."

t_ch: 「规则只有一个，用球砸晕在场的所有人就算胜利！」伴随着一声哨响，数颗粉色的达达球火速向着你的面门袭来。
t_en: "There's only one rule: Knock out all competitors on the field with the ball to win!" With a whistle, several pink dahdah balls fly straight towards your face.

t_ch: 你身处一颗金属林立的无名行星，残阳笼罩的废墟里，一台精密的机械巨构正在缓慢地向你走来。它拾起地面散落的零件，有条不紊地安装到堡垒般的身躯上。
t_en: You find yourself on a nameless planet full of towering metallic structures. Among the ruins basked in faint sunlight, a massive, sophisticated machine slowly makes its way toward you. It picks up the parts scattered all over the ground and fixes them onto its fortress-like body in an orderly manner.

t_ch: 活塞往复抬升，密集的杠杆牵引齿轮转动，发出沉闷的咆哮，遥遥无期地修复着破损的躯体。
t_en: The piston rises and falls, resulting in a vigorous lever effect that brings about the turning of the gears. The machine emits a deep growl as it mends its damaged body with little hope of completion.

t_ch: 一位耷拉着半截手臂的老翁来到你的面前，对于眼前诡谲的场景，古老的智械早已司空见惯。他用仅剩的一块视觉晶体盯着你这不速之客，很是满意地点了点头。
t_en: An old man approaches you with one-half of his arm drooping. The ancient Intellitron is unfazed by the peculiar scene before him. Using his last piece of visual crystal he has, he fixates his gaze upon you, an unexpected visitor, and nods approvingly.

t_ch: 「真是怀念，曾经，也有个像你一样的有机体站在这里，被帝皇亲手创造的生命所震撼。」
t_en: "How nostalgic. Once, there was also an organic creature like you standing here, marveling at the lives created by the emperor."

t_ch: 后来呢？
t_en: What happened next?

t_ch: 他是谁？
t_en: Who is he?

t_ch: 「我哪儿还记得？」老智械晃了晃自己的脑袋，一串被咬断的缆线从里面掉出来，还连带着几块刻有鲁珀特帝国徽记的氧化芯片，「他们都说我坏掉了，和这孩子一样。」
t_en: "How could I possibly remember?" The ancient Intellitron shakes his head, and a string of chewed cables falls out along with several oxidized chips engraved with the crest of the Rubert Empire. "They say I'm broken, just like this kid here."

t_ch: 骇人的钢铁堡垒在老翁的身后止住脚步，齿轮不断地咬合，发出奇异的声响，似乎在响应老翁的指令。
t_en: The dreadful steel fortress comes to a halt behind the old man. Its gears grind against each other non-stop, producing an odd noise. It seems to be responding to the old man's commands.

t_ch: 「帝皇的遗产并非只向无机体敞开，若你能够舍弃现有的桎梏…它将为你指引正确的方向。」智械的眼中闪烁起猩红的微光，他的话语如同一道魔咒，在你的意识里激起层层共鸣。
t_en: "The emperor's legacy isn't only available for inorganic creatures. If you can free yourself from your current shackles... it will guide you in the right direction." A faint crimson light flashes in the Intellitron's eyes. His words send ripples of resonance in your consciousness like a spell.

t_ch: 伟大的方程式在脑海中展开，冰凉的数据浸润在你的认知当中，等待在未来潜移默化的改变。
t_en: A grand formula unfolds in your mind. Cold data permeates your perception, waiting for subtle changes to take place in the future.

t_ch: 老翁呆滞地望着你，老旧的逻辑芯片无法理解你的行为，他颤抖着接过你手中的差分机，就像一个普通的、落寞的故国遗民。
t_en: The old man stares at you blankly, his obsolete logic chip unable to comprehend your actions. With his hands trembling, he takes the difference machine from you, looking just like an ordinary, despondent citizen of a fallen kingdom.

t_ch: 老翁从金属巨构上取下两块零件，郑重地交到你的手里，密集的方程式将你的认知篡改，强烈的回响令你头痛欲裂
t_en: The old man takes two parts from the metal behemoth and hands them over to you solemnly. A plethora of equations alters your cognition, their intense reverberations causing your head to split.

t_ch: 老翁从金属巨构上取下一块零件，它几乎是迫切地向你身边的其它零件靠拢，在它们的共鸣里，你仿佛听见了鲁珀特帝皇的余音。
t_en: The old man takes a part from the metal behemoth. The part moves closer to the rest of the parts surrounding you in apparent eagerness. Amid their resonance, you seem to discern the lingering voice of the Emperor Rubert.

t_ch: 残破的移动堡垒从你的头顶掠过，巨大的轰鸣让你的心脏都近乎停滞。
t_en: The battered moving fortress glides past the top of your head. Your heart almost stops beating because of the enormous roar.

t_ch: 当你回过神来，智械老人已经带着它走远了，身前只留下满地的辙印。
t_en: By the time you snap out of your trance, the ancient Intellitron has gone far with the machine, leaving behind tire tracks on the ground.

t_ch: 金属巨构并未回应你的期待，但它并不焦急，总有一天，帝国的后继者会抵达它的面前。
t_en: The colossal metal behemoth has not responded to your expectations. However, there is no need to rush because one day, the successor to the Empire will come here.

t_ch: 你坐在阴暗的帐篷里，耳畔是迪斯普夜市的刺耳喧嚣，催人入睡的香薰，过低的星球重力，都让你不由地感到头重脚轻。
t_en: You are sitting in a dim tent. The ear-piercing noise from the Dispo Night Market, the lulling scent of the incense, and the exceedingly low gravity of the planet leave you feeling lightheaded.

t_ch: 占卜师的面纱遮住了表情，唯有迷离的双眼浅浅地望向你，她从星空般深邃的长袖中抽出一副塔奥牌，熟稔地将它们分成几叠，陈列在你的面前。
t_en: A veil covers the soothsayer's expression, leaving only her vacant gaze glancing in your direction. She fishes out a pack of Tawot Cards from her sleeves that look as profound as the starlit heavens and deftly arranges them into several stacks before you.

t_ch: 「窥视命运，就像从积木底部抽走部件，倘若过于贪婪，预示便会轰然倒塌，」占卜师将手放在牌堆上，「而你，又希望从中看到什么？」
t_en: "Glimpsing into your destiny is akin to pulling blocks from the bottom of a tower. If one is too greedy, the entire prophecy will tumble." The soothsayer places her hands on the card stacks. "So, what do you wish to see?"

t_ch: 你曾经历过一些难以忘怀的事情，它们深刻地改变了你的生命轨迹，当你正视它们，未来也会随着改变。
t_en: You have some unforgettable experiences that have drastically altered the trajectory of your life. When you face them directly, your future will change accordingly.

t_ch: 疲惫的现状并非你期望的样貌。考虑的太多，却使你常常错过眼前的机遇，并为此陷入悔恨之中。
t_en: The weary state you find yourself in isn't what you hoped for. Overthinking has cost you a lot of opportunities, leaving you wallowing in regret.

t_ch: 你尝试追求日常的一种平衡，即使这意味着需要做出种种选择，你仍向往着理想中的自由生活。
t_en: You try to strike a balance in your daily life. Even though you need to make lots of choices along the way, you still long for the ideal life of freedom.

t_ch: 「看来你的运势并不好，收下这个护身符吧，它会保护你。」占卜师长叹了口气，把带着暖意的护符放到你的手心。
t_en: "Seems like the odds aren't in your favor. Take this lucky charm. It will protect you." The soothsayer lets out a long sigh and puts a warm lucky charm on your palm.

t_ch: 积极的态度终会得到积极的结果，经过了诸多的努力，你的生活很快就会迎来一次令人振奋的转折。
t_en: Life will eventually reward you if you maintain a positive attitude. After a painstaking effort, your life will soon welcome an exciting turning point.

t_ch: 你听到一阵咕噜噜的闷响，有什么在水里游弋。你缓缓转身，熟悉的面孔正伏在实验台前，她往培养仓中注入些许养料，诡丽的生灵在营养液里打了个转，似是在表达喜悦。
t_en: You hear a muffled gurgling sound which seems to come from something swimming in the water. Slowly, you turn around and see a familiar face leaning over an experiment bench, adding some nutrients into an incubator. The bizarre but beautiful creature inside makes a spin in the nutrient solution, as if expressing delight.

t_ch: 「时候选得不错。」阮•梅停下手头的工作，饶有趣味地看着你，「这批作品很快就能完成，只可惜，你应该没法在切片里停留太长的时间。」
t_en: "You came at a good time." Ruan Mei pauses her work and regards you with amusement. "This batch will soon be completed. It's a shame that you probably can't stay in the world slice for too long."

t_ch: 模仿着她的动作，培养仓里的小家伙也把身子探出水面，试图聆听你们的声音。
t_en: The little guy in the incubator imitates Ruan Mei's moves and pokes its body out of the water, trying to listen to your voices.

t_ch: 「或许…它们会给这个模拟宇宙带来一点小小的惊喜。」她的视线垂下，指尖挑逗着水中懵懂的造物。
t_en: "Maybe... they'll bring a small surprise for this Simulated Universe." With her eyes downcast, Ruan Mei playfully interacts with the innocent creation in the water using her fingertips.

t_ch: 千万不要是惊吓。
t_en: It'd better not be an unpleasant one.

t_ch: 希望黑塔不会生气。
t_en: I hope Herta won't be angry.

t_ch: 遇见你也是一种惊喜。
t_en: Meeting you is also a surprise in itself.

t_ch: 「我会让它的形式变得稍微…温和一些。」她绕过实验台，脚步宛如点水的蜻蜓。
t_en: "I'll make it take a slightly... milder form." She rounds the experiment bench in light footsteps.

t_ch: 「是因为奖励吧？」她莞尔一笑，缓步走到你的跟前。
t_en: "Are you here for the rewards?" Smiling gently, she approaches you slowly.

t_ch: 「我尽量。」她轻柔地抬起右手，掩住嘴角的笑意。
t_en: "I'll try my best." She lifts her right arm gracefully to cover her grin.

t_ch: 「变化是宇宙的常态，没有哪位学者期待一成不变的数据。基因深处的遗传变异，对撞实验的误差数据…」阮•梅悠然的看向实验室里的作品们，表情似笑非笑，「科学并不排斥这样的惊喜，它们往往意味着突破。」
t_en: "Change is a norm in the universe. No scholar would expect data to stay static. The mutations in the depth of genes and the anomalies in collision experiments..." Ruan Mei casts a relaxed glance at her creations in the lab with a faint and amused smile. "This kind of surprise isn't frowned upon in science because they often lead to breakthroughs."

t_ch: 「好了，来拿走属于你的那份惊喜吧。」
t_en: "Alright, time to retrieve the surprise that belongs to you."

t_ch: 你身处库宁特的一家金属食品店，店长喋喋不休地向你推销每一款产品，他在脸上涂满红黑色的锈斑，展示自己对智械的崇拜。
t_en: You find yourself in a Kunint metal foods store where the shopkeeper barely pauses for breath as they try to promote every single product they have. Their face is painted in blotches of dark-red rust to display their adoration for Intellitrons.

t_ch: 「亚共晶糖果，金属纯度<unbreak>29</unbreak>％，不仅复刻了合金的口感，甚至连咀嚼时的铁锈味也能完美复现。」
t_en: "Hypoeutectic candy, <unbreak>29</unbreak> percent pure metal. Not only does it replicate that classic alloy flavor, that authentic rust taste really comes through when you chew, too."

t_ch: 店长一把抓起罐里的糖果，塞到你的手里，「试吃一下吧，正宗地道的合金口味。」
t_en: The shopkeeper quickly grabs the candy from its can and stuffs it into your hands: "Try it, and you won't find authentic alloy flavors like it anywhere."

t_ch: 你产生了一种错觉，不是自己在嚼糖果，是糖果在嘴巴里嚼你。
t_en: You suddenly have a strange vision in your mind that it isn't you who is chewing the candy — it's the candy that is chewing you.

t_ch: 你已经吃饱了。
t_en: You're not hungry right now.

t_ch: 金属伟大，金属神圣，超越有机，不再为人。
t_en: Metal is great. Metal is divine. Metal will surpass the organics and humans will be no more.

t_ch: 你看到一幅魔幻现实主义的景象，有机体店长高喊鲁珀特万岁，张牙舞爪地向你冲来。
t_en: You glimpse a vision of magical realism as the organic shopkeeper launches themself at you in a violent rage, screaming: "Long live Rubert!"

t_ch: 你毫不怀疑，如果再不溜掉，他迟早得向你推销反有机方程。
t_en: You have no doubt that he'll try to sell you the Anti-Organic Equation if you don't get away.

t_ch: 「还有这个磁流体冰淇淋，包你肚子里的引擎都打转转。」店长头部以下的部分转了一圈，背后的义体把冰淇淋举到面前。
t_en: "We also have magnetic flow ice cream, perfect to get that engine in your stomach whirring!" The shopkeeper's body below their neck rotates, and their rear prosthetic lifts the ice cream in front of their face.

t_ch: <unbreak>22</unbreak>％的金属纯度，适合送给义体化程度低的朋友。
t_en: This is <unbreak>22</unbreak> percent pure metal, a great gift for a friend with a lower level of prosthesis.

t_ch: 「那是当然，金属纯度<unbreak>70</unbreak>％以上的大货。」店长搬出压箱底的收藏，人工做旧的箱子上，刻满了鲁珀特帝国的徽记。
t_en: "Well, of course, that is one of our over <unbreak>70%</unbreak> pure metal specialties." The shopkeeper pulls out their treasured collection from the bottom of an artificially aged chest that is covered in engraved crests of the Rubert Empire.

t_ch: 「据说，只要一个人的金属纯度超过百分之百，就能超脱羸弱的肉体，成为无机生命。」店长越说越起劲，四只义眼在眼眶里疯狂旋转。
t_en: "Legend has it that as soon as a person's metal purity exceeds <unbreak>100</unbreak> percent, they will be able to transcend their feeble body and become an inorganic being!" The shopkeeper grows more and more enthusiastic as they speak, their four prosthetic eyes spinning wildly in their sockets.

t_ch: 「你想想，二世不就是有机体？他能成为智械，咱当然也行。」
t_en: "Just think about it. Rubert II was an organic being too, right? If he can become an Intellitron, naturally we can, too!"

t_ch: 你走在一片光秃秃的废墟上，粒子湮灭虫在星际能源战争中将这里啃得一干二净，连土壤和岩石都不剩下的苍白地表，只有一台孤零零的自动售货机。
t_en: You stroll through the stark and bare ruins, where particle obliterator worms devoured everything on this land during the Interstellar Energy War. Not even soil or rocks remain on its lifeless pallid surface. All that remains is a lonely vending machine.

t_ch: 售货机骄傲地履行着它的职责，直到你的到来，打破了不用上班的美好时光。
t_en: The vending machine carries out its duties with great pride. That is until your arrival destroys its luxury of never having to work.

t_ch: 「逻辑：本机仍处于战时管理模式，请证明您拥有比战争另一方更高的投资价值，以及更高的获胜几率。」
t_en: "Logic: This machine is still in wartime management mode. Please prove that you have a higher investment value and greater chance of victory than your adversaries."

t_ch: 「基于您的投资价值，本机将评估对您的服务标准。」
t_en: "This machine will evaluate the standards of your service based on your investment value."

t_ch: 「否则，本机有理由判断，对您的支援无法使公司利益最大化，并拒绝您的消费要求——哔嘟，即将开始对您进行战斗力检定。」
t_en: "Or else, this machine will have justifiable cause to decide that supporting you will not stand to maximize the benefit for IPC and reject your request. Beep. Beep. Commencing your combat capability test."

t_ch: 售货机的辉光将你笼罩其中，对客户数据的测定，在古老的机器里发出嘎啦嘎啦的响声。
t_en: The bright light of the vending machine engulfed you as the client data evaluation process caused the ancient machine to rattle and clang.

t_ch: 「哔嘟…方案已拟定完成，请接受您的专属服务。」
t_en: "Beep... Your plan has been drafted. Please enjoy your personalized service."

t_ch: 「哔嘟，检定已开始，请勿离开检测范围。」
t_en: "Beep. Beep. Test has begun. Please leave the scanning area."

t_ch: 售货机沉默不语，你第一次知道，原来机器也会欺软怕硬。
t_en: The vending machine falls silent. For the first time in your life, you realize that machines have a habit of bullying the weak and fearing the strong, too.

t_ch: 事实证明，拳头是宇宙的通用货币。
t_en: This just goes to show that fists are the universal currency.

t_ch: 总有一天，你要它求着你买它的东西。
t_en: One day, you'll make it beg you to buy its goods.

t_ch: 贵有贵的好处，你如此安慰自己。
t_en: "Expensive things are expensive for a good reason," you tell yourself, trying to find comfort.

t_ch: 「基于归属权问题，任何威胁本机的行为，都将视作对星际和平公司的宣战——战斗模式启动。」
t_en: "Due to the ownership clauses, any threatening behavior towards this machine will be seen as a declaration of war against the IPC — battle mode activated."

t_ch: 你走进阴暗的档案资料馆，库存史料散发出腐朽的气息，看台中央，执笔的画家正在用调色盘配置颜料。
t_en: You enter the dimly lit archives as the records around you emit an atmosphere of decay. In the center of the platform, you see a painter busy mixing colors on their palette.

t_ch: 「烛墨学派，无名无姓的学士，你没有记住我的理由。」
t_en: "I am a nameless scholar of the Candelagraphos, and you have no reason to recall who I am."

t_ch: 他在提问前做出回答，又在画布上轻点几笔，勾勒出你的身影。「在历史被蛀蚀之前，总要有人把它们临摹下来。」
t_en: He answers your question before you even have time to ask and traces a few gentle strokes onto the canvas to outline your figure. "History must be traced via painting before they are completedly eroded away."

t_ch: 画家长叹了口气，咬住画笔，似是纠结如何收尾。「最后一笔，无名客，在你看来，历史是什么颜色？」
t_en: The artist sighs as they bite their brush, seemingly unsure of how to round off their work. "For the final touch, Nameless, what color is history to you?"

t_ch: 「星际和平公司在千余个琥珀纪中扮演着重要的角色，但要我说，他们只是这张画上的污点。」画家发出轻蔑的笑声。
t_en: "Though the IPC has played an important role for over a thousand Amber Eras, in my eyes, they are no more than a blemish on this painting." The painter loosed a mocking scoff.

t_ch: 「死亡与鲜血无处不在，星际能源战争和第二次帝皇战争几乎在同时兴起，但帝皇手上的鲜血远不如有机体自身浓艳。」画家缓缓抬手，为画布增添上猩红。
t_en: "There is no land that is not stained with the colors of death and blood. Though the Interstellar Energy War and the Emperor's War were waged almost simultaneously, the blood on the hands of the Emperor is nowhere near as bright and radiant as that on the hands of organic beings." The painter slowly lifted their hand to add bright scarlet to their work.

t_ch: 「总有人试图为时间注解特征，虚构史学家试图为鲁珀特杜撰过去，但在时间面前，这些挣扎毫无意义。」画家落笔之重，差些把画布捅穿。
t_en: "There are always those who will try to interpret the properties of time. History Fictionologists attempt to fabricate a past for Rubert, but such struggles are meaningless in the face of time itself." The pressure of the artist's brush grows almost heavy enough to pierce the canvas.

t_ch: 普雷图星的核心，古老的造物单元发出滴滴答答的声响，锈蚀的实验记录在一百个琥珀纪前停滞，但留下的程序仍在持续迭代更新。
t_en: At the core of the planet Plato, an ancient creation unit ticks away. Though records on this rusting experiment stopped a hundred Amber Eras prior, the protocols left behind had been constantly updating.

t_ch: 「逻辑：鉴于大一统方程缺失，本机尚未具备完整的造物机能，因此，仅支持模糊需求的物品生产，请见谅。」
t_en: "Logic: Due to a disparity in the grand unified equation, this machine is not yet capable of complete creation functions. Therefore, only the creation of products with vague requirements can be supported. Thank you for your understanding."

t_ch: 造物单元向你提问，核心需要新的主人给它一个课题，让它完成制造万物的使命。
t_en: The creation unit tells you that it requires a new master to provide it with a new research topic so that it may complete its mission of creation of all things.

t_ch: 「程序已启动，开始确定造物需求——您所需要的物品，是否具备虚数真空性？」
t_en: "Protocol activated, initializing creation request. Does the item that you have requested utilize imaginary vacuum properties?"

t_ch: 「造物工作已完成，请验收——注：由本设备制造的任何物品，其专利及解释权归▄▀▄▄学派所有。」
t_en: "Creation complete. Please take your item. Please note: The patent and right to interpretation of any items created by this equipment are the sole property of the School of ▄▀▄▄."
