t_en: "Creation complete. Please take your item. Please note: The patent and right to interpretation of any items created by this equipment are the sole property of the School of ▄▀▄▄."

t_ch: 「已纳入，确认次级造物需求——你所需要的物品，是否具备实在性？」
t_en: "Properties integrated, confirming secondary creation requirements. Is the object you require realistic?"

t_ch: 「已纳入，确认次级造物需求——你所需要的物品，是否具备可复现性？」
t_en: "Properties integrated, confirming secondary creation requirements. Is the object you require reproducible?"

t_ch: 「已纳入，确认次级造物需求——你所需要的物品，是否具备时空稳定性？」
t_en: "Properties integrated, confirming secondary creation requirements. Does the object you require possess space-time stability?"

t_ch: 这是一个无比空旷的房间，它是那样完美，优雅的正方体结构，洁白的金属墙壁完全封闭，甚至连墙角都被浇筑成一百二十度的弧形，找不到一丝缝隙。
t_en: You are in a vast and empty room. It is a perfect and elegant cube shape. Its pure, white metal walls are completely sealed. The corners of the walls are even constructed into a <unbreak>120</unbreak>-degree arc to leave no gap or crack.

t_ch: 在空无一物的房间正中间，摆放着一个巨大的红色按钮，没有任何说明，也没有任何保护，仅是孤零零地立在中央的机械装置上。
t_en: In the center of the empty room is a giant, red button. There is no explanation or protection. It stands alone atop a mechanical device in the center of the room.

t_ch: 恍惚间，你仿佛听到，机械的传动声在按钮下回响，宛如一颗跳动的心脏。等反应过来，你的手已在不知不觉间放到了按钮上。
t_en: In a flash, you feel like you can hear the echo of a mechanical device whirring to life under the button, like the beating of a heart. When you realize what has happened, you see your hand placed upon the red button.

t_ch: 危险永远来自于好奇——恐怖片都这么演的。
t_en: Curiosity always leads to danger — You've seen enough horror movies to know this.

t_ch: 往好处想，按钮下或许是被封印的邪神，又或者一颗毁灭星辰的炸弹。总之，恭喜，你成功拯救了世界。
t_en: Let's think positively. Maybe there was an evil outer god sealed under the button, or maybe a bomb that could destroy stars? Either way, congratulations! You just saved the world!

t_ch: 都说了让你别按。
t_en: I told you not to press the button.

t_ch: 什么也没有发生，或许是太久没动，所以卡住了？你决定再按一次。
t_en: Nothing happened. Maybe it hasn't been pushed in so long that it's gotten stuck? You decide to press it again.

t_ch: 空房间里传来机械的警示，「这个按钮非常危险，我劝你最好别这么做。」
t_en: A mechanical voice resounds throughout the empty room, warning you: "This button is extremely dangerous, and we advise that you do not press it."

t_ch: 顷刻间，房间开始颤动，脚下不断传来齿轮啮合的声响，无论它到底是什么，你都一定唤醒了某位极其恐怖的存在。
t_en: In an instant, the room begins to shake and the sound of gears turning together comes endlessly pouring out from under your feet. Whatever it is, you must have awakened some kind of terrifying existence.

t_ch: 你奄奄一息地走进阿莉达星的宾馆，不知道为什么，这里的居民在做事时，个个都显得慢条斯理又心不在焉。
t_en: You enter a hotel on the Alda Star System on the brink of death. You have no idea why, but it seems that all of the residents here seem extremely slow and absent-minded with everything they do.

t_ch: 冗长的泊停登记磨灭了你的耐心，外星细菌消杀更是令你陷入了长达二十个标准时的空腹时间。
t_en: The long and drawn-out docking registration process has destroyed your patience and the alien bacteria extermination process has sent you into a long, <unbreak>20</unbreak>-hour period of fasting.

t_ch: 你满怀期待地打开点餐软件，可万恶的选择困难症，立刻通过琳琅满目的菜品攫住你的思维，令本就疲惫的大脑陷入一片空白。
t_en: You open up a food ordering app with great expectation, but the vile beast of decision paralysis immediately grips your mind as your eyes are dazzled with endless menu options, causing your already exhausted mind to descend into blankness.

t_ch: 你很快意识到，自己遭遇了银河史上第二无解的哲学难题——今天吃什么。
t_en: You immediately realize that you have encountered the second most challenging philosophical conundrum in the universe — What to eat?

t_ch: 遇事不决，直接选最熟悉的。
t_en: When in doubt, order whatever looks the most familiar.

t_ch: 自暴自弃，选择了最诡异的。
t_en: You decided to throw yourself to the wolves and order the strangest thing on the menu.

t_ch: 你的肚子叫得更大声了。
t_en: The growls of your stomach grow louder.

t_ch: 根据你的文化归属和生物特征，软件挑选了十余种推荐套餐，但你挑挑选选，仍没能得出结论。它不断为你刷新推荐的内容，可要么就太油腻，要么就太寡淡。
t_en: The app selects a dozen recommendations for you based on your cultural background and your biological characteristics. Yet you scroll through them all, still unable to reach a conclusion. As it keeps refreshing its recommendations for you, you can't help but think they're either too oily or too bland, or...

t_ch: 它问你，有什么特别想吃的东西。你说——随便。
t_en: It finally asks you: "Is there anything you really want to eat? Just tell me, anything."

t_ch: 「我是一个没用的垃圾软件，您还是另请高明吧。」它向你推荐了另一款选餐软件，并打给你一笔饭钱。
t_en: "I am a useless, trash app. Please consult another app that may be of assistance to you." It recommends another ordering app to you and sends you some money for food.

t_ch: 你下载了新的点餐软件，极简风的设计，来自本地居民的诸多好评，已让你确信，这个软件必然有它的过人之处。
t_en: You download the new ordering app. Its minimalist design and many positive reviews from the locals assure you that this software must have something special about it.

t_ch: 「本应用旨在为患有特格林综合症、奇洛兹第三神经失调等选择困难症患者提供帮助，辅助他们做出决定，以防他们在决定今天吃什么前，饿死在点餐软件前。」
t_en: "This app is designed to assist sufferers of Tergryn's Syndrome and Keylov's tertiary neurological dysfunction in making decisions, to prevent them from starving to death in front of an app before being able to decide what they would like to eat."

t_ch: 「在制作出本应用前，裘斯博士曾长年投身于选择困难症的治疗研究。但任何试图通过大数据分析、个性化推荐以及药物对选择困难症患者的治疗，都以失败告终。」
t_en: "Before developing this app, Doctor Joss dedicated many years to the treatment of decision paralysis. However, all his attempts to treat decision paralysis in patients via big data analysis, personalized recommendations, or medication ended in failure."

t_ch: 「功夫不负有心人，裘斯博士还是找到了唯一解。」
t_en: "Though nothing can stop a motivated man, Doctor Joss finally came to his one and only solution."

t_ch: 只要不选择，就不会困难。
t_en: If there is no decision to be made, then there can be no challenge.

t_ch: 你坐在时间代理银行的人工服务台前，透过水缸，娇小的柜员在处理器前变换表皮的色彩，向你简述大致的开户流程。
t_en: You sit before the manual service desk of Time Agency Bank. Looking through the water tank, you see a petite teller in front of a processor, changing their skin color and describing the general account opening process.

t_ch: 「再确认一次，您将存入<unbreak>100</unbreak>个标准时的定期存款，按照2％的利率，时间代理银行将在五个公转周期后向您支付报酬。如确认无误，请遵照开户流程进行验证。」
t_en: "Just to confirm, you will be depositing a one-hundred standard hour deposit and the Time Agency Bank will pay your interest at a rate of two percent in five rotations' time. If this is correct, please complete verification according to the account opening process."

t_ch: 你点点头，伸出双手，手指与柜员的触手在屏幕上相接，完成一对一的身份校验。
t_en: You nod, reach out your hands and your fingers meet the teller's tentacles through the screen as you complete one identity verification after another.

t_ch: 「为确保您的账户安全，请您在开户前设置二级密保问题，请在屏幕上完成后续操作。」
t_en: "In order to ensure the safety of your account, please set a secondary security question and complete operations on the screen."

t_ch: 问题一，您的出生地是？
t_en: Question one, where were you born?

t_ch: 问题二，您的种族为？
t_en: Question two, what is your species?

t_ch: 「设置已完成。本行为首次开通服务的客户准备了礼品，请到前台窗口处凭储蓄卡领取。」触手将一张防水套里的银行卡递给你。
t_en: "Configuration complete. This bank has prepared a gift for customers who activate this service for the first time. Please go to the front desk window and use your debit card to retrieve your reward." The tentacle reaches forward to give you a bank card enclosed in a waterproof envelope.

t_ch: 「感谢您对时间代理银行的支持——请时刻牢记，时间就是金钱。」
t_en: "Thank you for your support of Time Agency Bank. Always remember: Time is money."

t_ch: 西红柿的末端。
t_en: The extremity of a tomato.

t_ch: 第Ⅸ机关单位大院。
t_en: Device IX unit compound.

t_ch: 黑塔空间站。
t_en: Herta Space Station.

t_ch: 超合金混凝土。
t_en: Superalloy concrete.

t_ch: 智人。
t_en: Homo sapiens.

t_ch: 食虫菌毯。
t_en: Insect-eating fungi.

t_ch: 你又一次走进时间代理银行的大厅，职员们的皮肤在黑与红间转换，表达他们的欢迎。你走到自动取款机前，想要取出此前储存的时间。
t_en: You once again re-enter the Time Agency Bank main hall as the staff alternate their skin colors between black and red, expressing their welcome. You approach the ATM hoping to withdraw the time you deposited before.

t_ch: 「检测到您的定期存款提取申请，为保障您的财产安全，请回答下列二次密保问题，验证您的个人身份。」
t_en: "We have received your application for your time deposit withdrawal. In order to ensure the safety of your funds, please answer the following secondary security questions to verify your identity."

t_ch: 问题一，您的出生地是？
t_en: Question one, where were you born?

t_ch: 密保问题回答错误，验证失败。如果您是首次开户的储户，请移步到人工服务台，在工作人员的协助下完成开户工作。
t_en: Security question answered incorrectly. Verification failed. If you are opening an account for the first time, please move to the manual service counter to complete this operation with the assistance of our staff.

t_ch: 此外，时间代理银行提醒您，请务必保管好个人时间。
t_en: At this moment, Time Agency Bank would like to remind you to take care of your personal time.

t_ch: 验证成功，请选择您需要提取的时间类型。
t_en: Verification successful. Please select the time type that you would like to withdraw.

t_ch: 问题二，您的种族为？
t_en: Question two, what is your species?

t_ch: 柜员们的皮肤在黄与蓝间转换，表达他们的送别。「感谢您对时间代理银行的支持——请务必牢记，时间就是金钱，金钱就是一切。」
t_en: The staff's skin colors fluctuate between yellow and blue, indicating their farewell. "Thank you for your support of Time Agency Bank. Always remember: Time is money, and money is everything."

t_ch: 比起和密码死磕，你选择了更高效的策略——请时刻牢记，时间就是金钱。
t_en: Instead of fighting with your password, you decide to go for a more efficient strategy. Please remember, time is money.

t_ch: 你奄奄一息地走进阿莉达星的宾馆，不知道为什么，这里的居民在做事时，个个都显得慢条斯理又心不在焉。
t_en: You enter a hotel on the Alda Star System on the brink of death. You have no idea why, but it seems that all of the residents here seem extremely slow and absent-minded with everything they do.

t_ch: 冗长的泊停登记磨灭了你的耐心，外星细菌消杀更是令你陷入了长达二十个标准时的空腹时间。
t_en: The long and drawn-out docking registration process has destroyed your patience and the alien bacteria extermination process has sent you into a long, <unbreak>20</unbreak>-hour period of fasting.

t_ch: 你满怀期待地打开点餐软件，可万恶的选择困难症，立刻通过琳琅满目的菜品攫住你的思维，令本就疲惫的大脑陷入一片空白。
t_en: You open up a food ordering app with great expectation, but the vile beast of decision paralysis immediately grips your mind as your eyes are dazzled with endless menu options, causing your already exhausted mind to descend into blankness.

t_ch: 你很快意识到，自己遭遇了银河史上第二无解的哲学难题——今天吃什么。
t_en: You immediately realize that you have encountered the second most challenging philosophical conundrum in the universe — What to eat?

t_ch: 你走进一片词语滋养的森林，追查某位越狱的谜语人。句子、短语、语素和发音冲刷你的身体，雨滴渗透进皮肤，替换掉原有的含义。
t_en: You enter a forest that has been cultivated by words and language, tracking a Riddler who has escaped from prison. Sentences, phrases, morphemes, and phonemes wash over you and soak through your skin like raindrops, changing your body parts' original meanings.

t_ch: 你的外壳变成了发皱的树皮，双腿上不断地生出根须，似要扎根进土壤。
t_en: Your outer shell transforms into aged bark and your legs begin to grow endless roots that seem to want to burrow into the soil.

t_ch: 你狠狠地掐住大腿的肌肉，直到疼痛让眼前的事物恢复正常。该死的家伙，等你抓住他，准要把星际和平网络的垃圾话大全塞进他的嘴巴。
t_en: You pinch at the muscle in your legs with all your strength until the pain returns everything to normal. When you get your hands on this scoundrel you're going to force-feed him every word of trash talk on the Interastral Peace Network!

t_ch: 「我为你准备了十个字，希望你能从中体验语言的美妙。」他缓缓隐入词语的森林，一道由十个字连成的怪物浪潮，咆哮着向你袭来。
t_en: "I have prepared ten words for you, and I hope that you will experience the true beauty of language from them!" He slowly disappears into the forest of words, as waves of monsters made from ten words begin their assault with a great roar.

t_ch: 你掏出兜里的橡皮擦，打算让他见识见识，什么叫一物降一物。
t_en: You pull out the eraser from your pocket, fully prepared to teach him that everything has a weakness.

t_ch: 遇事不决，直接选最熟悉的。
t_en: When in doubt, order whatever looks the most familiar.

t_ch: 你奄奄一息地走进阿莉达星的宾馆，不知道为什么，这里的居民在做事时，个个都显得慢条斯理又心不在焉。
t_en: You enter a hotel on the Alda Star System on the brink of death. You have no idea why, but it seems that all of the residents here seem extremely slow and absent-minded with everything they do.

t_ch: 冗长的泊停登记磨灭了你的耐心，外星细菌消杀更是令你陷入了长达二十个标准时的空腹时间。
t_en: The long and drawn-out docking registration process has destroyed your patience and the alien bacteria extermination process has sent you into a long, <unbreak>20</unbreak>-hour period of fasting.

t_ch: 你满怀期待地打开点餐软件，可万恶的选择困难症，立刻通过琳琅满目的菜品攫住你的思维，令本就疲惫的大脑陷入一片空白。
t_en: You open up a food ordering app with great expectation, but the vile beast of decision paralysis immediately grips your mind as your eyes are dazzled with endless menu options, causing your already exhausted mind to descend into blankness.

t_ch: 你很快意识到，自己遭遇了银河史上第二无解的哲学难题——今天吃什么。
t_en: You immediately realize that you have encountered the second most challenging philosophical conundrum in the universe — What to eat?

t_ch: 你坐在发烫的沙发上，灯光令你一时有些眩晕。菠萝面包的勇敢者游戏已步入尾声，最后的幸存者，所有人都在等待你的选择。
t_en: You sit on the hot sofa as the lights make you temporarily dizzy. The game of bravery: Pineapple Bread is approaching its final stages as everyone awaits your decision as the final survivor.

t_ch: 「两个盒子，吃下菠萝，拿走奖金，吃下面包，滚蛋走人。」主持人的复眼倒映出狂热的观众，比起胜利，他们更想看失败。
t_en: "There are two boxes left. Eat the pineapple and take the prize or eat the bread and get lost." The manic faces of the audience are reflected in the host's compound eyes — They don't want to see you win. They want to see you fail.

t_ch: 银河里有超过九千种叫做菠萝的物体，它可能是一颗石头，一片叶子，甚至是一颗黑洞。在打开盒子前，没人知道里面是什么。
t_en: There are over nine thousand objects in the cosmos that go by the name of "pineapple." Some are rocks, some are leaves, and some are even black holes. Until you open this box, no one knows what lies within.

t_ch: 你的思维凝滞，脑海中浮现出上一届亚军被等离子菠萝瞬间蒸发的影像。
t_en: Your brain freezes as images of the last runner-up being evaporated by a plasma pineapple rush through your mind.

t_ch: 「菠萝还是面包？！」观众们不耐烦地催促。
t_en: "Pineapple or bread!?" The spectators impatiently spur you on.

t_ch: 富贵险中求，你囫囵吞下菠萝，口中泛起阵阵苦涩。
t_en: One doesn't get rich without taking risks! As you swallow the pineapple, a bitterness runs over your tongue.

t_ch: 你深刻明白一个道理，再多的钱也要有命来花。
t_en: You become deeply aware of a great truth: That no matter how much money you have, you have to be alive to spend it.

t_ch: 本节目由星际和平公司赞助播出，正宗菠萝气泡水，为您带来难忘的味觉盛宴。
t_en: This program is sponsored by the Interastral Peace Corporation. Authentic pineapple soda, bringing you an unforgettable feast of flavor.

t_ch: 你找到一只年幼的苍猿，它懒散地趴倒在石头上，浓密的毛发里浸满了阳光，随风飘摇，像是草原上的波涛。
t_en: You find a young ape lounging lazily on a rock. Its dense fur soaks in sunlight and sways in the wind like waves on a grassy plain.

t_ch: 苍猿惬意地翻了个身，自然的肌肉曲线勾勒出野性的轮廓，完美的弧度，就连博识学会的数学家看了也要流口水。
t_en: The ape leisurely rolls over, its natural muscle contours tracing an untamed silhouette with perfect curves that make even the Intelligentsia Guild mathematicians drool.

t_ch: 还有那尾巴，它自由地在空中晃荡，轻柔，绵软，仿佛不属于身体一般，做出无序的混沌运动，美得宛如洛德尔吸引子模型。
t_en: And that tail... it is jauntily swaying in the air, soft and comfy, like it is its own entity. It moves with a mind of its own in orderless chaos, as mesmerizing as a Lodell oscillator model.

t_ch: 自然的纯粹，科学的简洁，演化毫不吝啬把它们赠予同一位造物。你悄悄靠近这只苍猿，蠕动的手指已按捺不住心中的激动。
t_en: The purity of nature, the simplicity of science — evolution has generously gifted both of these traits into one creation. You silently sidle close to this ape, your wriggling fingers barely able to suppress the excitement threatening to boil over in your heart.

t_ch: 苍猿没有拒绝你的接触，它头部的毛发并不浓密，却有溪流般的柔顺。它主动向你的手掌蹭了蹭，发出亲昵的哼哼声。
t_en: The ape doesn't reject your touch. The fur on its head isn't too thick, but has the suppleness of a river stream. It actively rubs against the palm of your hand, cooing in an affectionate tone.

t_ch: 「嘿嘿，我的毛茸茸。」你挠挠它的下巴，苍猿蜷缩成一小团，把你整个裹进厚重的毛发里，尾巴自在地在空中打转。
t_en: "Heh-heh, my fluffy." You scratch its chin. The ape curls into a ball, wrapping your entire body in a world of heavy fur, its tail whimsically twirling in the air.

t_ch: 沿着毛发生长的轨迹，你的手指轻轻地掠过苍猿的尾巴，柔软的触感，还有下意识想要挣脱的摆动，都让你兴奋不已。
t_en: Your fingers lightly glide across the trail of fur and reach the ape's tail — it is soft to the touch, and its reflexive twitches in an attempt to escape your grasp evoke an inexplicable thrill within you.

t_ch: 「嘿嘿，我的软乎乎。」它有些困惑地盯着你，但很快放弃了思考，苍猿转过身去，背对着你，似乎在暗示你继续抚摸下去。
t_en: "Heh-heh, my floofy floof." It stares at you, somewhat confused, but very quickly abandoning all thought. The ape turns around with its back to you, as if hinting at you to keep caressing it.

t_ch: 你的手指不老实地探进苍猿的肚子，它的毛发是那样深邃，仿佛能够吞没一切的悲伤，就连「虚无」的黑洞也要相形见绌。
t_en: You eagerly dip your fingers into the ape's tummy. The fur there is so long and lush, as if it could swallow up all sorrow — even the black hole of Nihility pales in comparison.

t_ch: 「嘿嘿，我的蓬肚肚。」警觉的苍猿，在你的抚摸下逐渐失去了敌意，它瘫软在石头上，任凭另一头灵长类玩弄。
t_en: "Heh-heh, my floofy tummy." The wary ape gradually throws all caution to the wind under your caress, lounging limply across the rock, allowing another primate to play with it.

t_ch: 你以一万分的坚定断绝了心中的欲念，既为你的安全考虑，也为苍猿的心理健康着想。
t_en: You sever your heart's desires with sheer resolution, in consideration of both your safety and the ape's mental health.

t_ch: 远处猎食者的啸叫惊走了苍猿，毛乎乎的触感还停留在手心——下次去摸湮厄鹰好了。
t_en: A carnivore's roar from afar scares away the ape, but the fluffy sensation at your fingertips still lingers — you should try touching a Torment Eagle in the future.

t_ch: 不知是否被触碰到了伤口，亦或是单纯心情不爽，苍猿蛮横地纵身而起，露出獠牙，发出威吓的吼叫。
t_en: Perhaps you accidentally touched its wound — or it is simply agitated — the ape brusquely leaps to its feet, bares its fangs, and bellows loudly in intimidation.

t_ch: 来不及闪躲，苍猿的爪子已经以肉眼无法捕捉的速度向你袭来。
t_en: Unable to dodge in time, the ape's nails are already lunging at you at a speed that the naked eye cannot catch.

t_ch: 苍猿消失在了黑暗里，你应该庆幸，至少它没有以侵犯动物人格对你发起诉讼。
t_en: The ape disappears in the darkness. You should take comfort in the fact that it did not file an animal rights' violation complaint against you.

t_ch: 突如其来的刺激让苍猿骤然暴起，它咆哮着甩开你的手，浑身肌肉紧绷，来自大自然的霸气毫无预兆地浮现在它的身上。
t_en: The sudden stimulus riles up the ape immensely, howling as it slaps away your hand, all its muscles tensed up. The sheer domination of nature, raw and without warning, emanates from its body.

t_ch: 它愤怒地拍打起胸脯，喉咙里挤出咆哮，准备让无理的陌生人接受应得的惩罚。
t_en: It furiously beats its chest, channeling a howl from its lungs, ready to mete deserved punishment on this unruly stranger.

t_ch: 今天，这个毛，你是摸定了！
t_en: You'll be caressing this fur today, whether the ape likes it or not!

t_ch: 你走进冉比希星的地下据点，大量武器和垃圾桶随着生产管线从天而降，冉比希三世骑在战马之上，威严比起塔塔洛夫有增无减。
t_en: You enter the underground stronghold of the Rumbas system. A large number of weapons and trashcans fall from the production pipeline. Rumbas the Third rides atop his horse, displaying his authority that rivals Tatalov, undiminishing and ever-burgeoning.

t_ch: 长久以来，垃圾桶承受着不平等的待遇，作为人类的工具，毫无尊严可言。
t_en: For a long time, trashcans have endured unequal treatment. They are treated as mere tools of humanity, devoid of dignity.

t_ch: 冉比希三世振臂高呼，他要求权力，能够自由获取厨余垃圾和可回收垃圾的权力。他将带着垃圾桶大军横扫寰宇，成为诸界的主人。
t_en: Rumbas the Third raises his arm and shouts. He demands power, power to freely access organic and recyclable waste. He vows to lead an army of trashcans to dominate the universe and become the master of all realms.

t_ch: 冉比希三世的目光落到你的身上，「打败塔塔洛夫的英雄，和其他的劣等人类不同，我会给你一个机会。」
t_en: Rumbas the Third's gaze falls on you. "The hero who defeated Tatalov... You are different from other inferior humans. I will give you a chance."

t_ch: 是臣服于冉比希三世，接受皇帝的加冕，还是效忠你所归属的人类，继续对垃圾桶的压迫？
t_en: Will you kneel before Rumbas the Third and accept the emperor's honors, or swear loyalty to the human race to which you belong and continue to oppress the trashcans?

t_ch: 冉比希三世尊重你的选择，他佯装悲戚地呼唤来克隆桶亲信，嘱咐他们，留给你一个「体面」的结局。
t_en: Rumbas the Third respects your choice. He fakes his sadness as he summons his cloned trash kin, instructing them to give you a "dignified" end.

t_ch: 区区一个垃圾桶也敢命令你？你挥舞起球棒，冲向冉比希三世，准备夺了这皇帝的鸟位。
t_en: A mere trashcan dares to order you around? You swing your bat and charge at Rumbas the Third, ready to snatch this emperor's perch.

t_ch: 你坐在水晶海洋的堤坝上，硕大的羽鲸穿过物质世界的边缘，纵身跃起，又迅速落回璀璨的晶体结构中。
t_en: You sit by the dam of the crystal sea. A massive feathered whale traverses the material world's border, leaping out of the surface, then swiftly crashing back into the scintillating crystal structure.

t_ch: 上百上千的垂钓者相互拥挤，他们手握相位偏移鱼竿，任凭饵料沉入水晶深处。
t_en: Hundreds of thousands of anglers jostle about, their hands grappling at phase-shifting fishing rods and letting their bait sink into the crystalline depths.

t_ch: 迪喀纳人以垂钓的方式向水晶母亲献上祈祷，母亲会顺应每个人的意识，给予相应的回报。说罢，大祭司将一块黄金挂在鱼钩上，用力抛投向固体海洋。
t_en: The Dygnans use angling to offer prayers to the Crystal Mother, and she gives everyone reciprocating rewards based on each of their will. After saying this, the High Priest hangs a piece of gold to the hook, casting it powerfully into the solid sea.

t_ch: 「简单来说就是，只要献上祭品，你能在这里钓上任何东西，甚至包括鱼。」向导毫无敬畏地翻译道。
t_en: "Simply put, as long as you offer tribute, you can catch anything you want here, even fish." The guide irreverently translates.

t_ch: 一入钓鱼深似海，想想你空空如也的钱包，顿时就没那么想抛竿了。
t_en: The gateway to fishing opens into an abyss. The mere thought of your empty purse abruptly stops your cast midway.

t_ch: 你将意识和手中的鱼线连接到一起，大祭司说，那是用水晶母亲的身体打造的丝线。你听到亲切的声音，从四面八方询问你。
t_en: You tie your consciousness and the fishing line in your hand together. The High Priest says that this thread was crafted from the Crystal Mother's body. You hear an affectionate voice querying you from all around.

t_ch: 水晶用自己的身体哺育现实，而你又将献上什么祭品，填补超验世界的饥渴？
t_en: The crystal uses its own body to nurture reality. What tribute do you intend to offer to sate the thirst of the transcendental world?

t_ch: 你抛出沉甸甸的鱼钩，它缓缓地渗透进水晶当中，下潜到肉眼无法捕捉的领域。
t_en: You cast the heavy fishing hook, and it slowly penetrates into the crystal, sinking into a domain that the eye cannot fathom.

t_ch: 你忽地感觉有什么拂过自己的面庞，一阵风，一滴雨，它叫你收起鱼线，结束这场水晶母亲的献祭。
t_en: You suddenly feel something graze your face — a gust, a raindrop — it tells you to reel your line in, to end this tribute to the Crystal Mother.

t_ch: 一块晶莹的宝石将鱼钩整个包裹住，透过它的外壁，你隐约看到，有什么东西在缓慢地蠕动。
t_en: A glittering gem completely envelops the hook. Through its glinting surface, you glimpse something languidly writhing within.

t_ch: 你奄奄一息地走进阿莉达星的宾馆，不知道为什么，这里的居民在做事时，个个都显得慢条斯理又心不在焉。
t_en: You enter a hotel on the Alda Star System on the brink of death. You have no idea why, but it seems that all of the residents here seem extremely slow and absent-minded with everything they do.

t_ch: 冗长的泊停登记磨灭了你的耐心，外星细菌消杀更是令你陷入了长达二十个标准时的空腹时间。
t_en: The long and drawn-out docking registration process has destroyed your patience and the alien bacteria extermination process has sent you into a long, <unbreak>20</unbreak>-hour period of fasting.

t_ch: 你满怀期待地打开点餐软件，可万恶的选择困难症，立刻通过琳琅满目的菜品攫住你的思维，令本就疲惫的大脑陷入一片空白。
t_en: You open up a food ordering app with great expectation, but the vile beast of decision paralysis immediately grips your mind as your eyes are dazzled with endless menu options, causing your already exhausted mind to descend into blankness.

t_ch: 你很快意识到，自己遭遇了银河史上第二无解的哲学难题——今天吃什么。
t_en: You immediately realize that you have encountered the second most challenging philosophical conundrum in the universe — What to eat?

t_ch: 你走在岩浆流淌的炼狱之中，难以消散的毒烟，让战争烘炉的大气呈现出阴暗的色调，一如火匠马格那张毫无表情的脸。
t_en: You walk through the abyss of flowing magma as the thick toxic smoke colors the Warforge air with dark tones, much like the emotionless face of Magg the Firesmith.

t_ch: 「我可以为你打造任何兵器，只要你向我保证，它们会被用于无上的毁灭。」独眼独手的老匠人往围裙上抹了把灰，取出尚未冷却的工具。
t_en: "I can craft any weapon of war that you desire. All I ask is that you promise me that it will be used for supreme destruction." The one-eyed, one-armed craftsman wipes his ashy hand on his apron before pulling out his still red-hot tools.

t_ch: 聚变炉开始运转，苍蓝色的火焰呼啸，马格不耐烦地盯着你，「你还在等什么？我的锤子都快无聊得睡着了。」
t_en: As the fusion furnace hums to life and the blue flames within begin to roar, Magg stares at you impatiently. "What are you waiting for? My hammer can barely stay awake with this boredom!"

t_ch: 「这家伙的骨头挺硬」，马格称赞道，「不像那些动不动就嗷嗷叫的反物质火焰。」
t_en: "This thing's got some pretty sturdy bones!" Magg exclaims, impressed. "Nothing like those antimatter flames that spend the whole time wailing!"

t_ch: 你行走在普尔普冰晶海的滩涂边缘，往日瑰丽的景色被一具具山峦般的尸骸阻挡，巨大的彗星蝉搁浅在岸上，散发出阵阵恶臭。
t_en: You walk along the beach of the Purpu Crystal Ocean, its once breathtaking scenery eclipsed by one mountainous corpse after another. The comet cicadas lay beached, emitting a putrid stench.

t_ch: 「亚种真蛰虫，它们寄生在彗星蝉体内，掏空里面的血肉，留下死亡的蝉蜕。」星空生态学派的学士爬上尸骸，把探测针头扎进腐烂的伤口。
t_en: "A subspecies of True Sting has parasitized inside the bodies of these comet cicadas, hollowing out their insides and leaving only a dead husk." An Astral Ecology scholar climbs the cicada corpse and inserts a detector into a festering wound.

t_ch: 「我在搜集它们的信息素特征，理论上，可以在虫灾扩散前找到元凶。」
t_en: "I am collecting their pheromone signature. Theoretically, I should be able to find these culprits before the plague spreads."

t_ch: 你模仿学士的动作，将探针扎进外壳，但针尖撞到了更坚硬的东西。干裂的表皮中钻出一抹漆黑的影子，在冰冷的阳光下发出嗡鸣。
t_en: You copy the scholars' movements and insert the detector into the outer shell, but the needle strikes something harder. A jet-black shadow emerges from the dry, cracked surface and begins to emit a low drone under the cold sunlight.

t_ch: 「留它一口气！这个我还用得着！」学士下意识吼道。
t_en: The scholar instinctively shouts out: "Don't kill it! I can still use that for my research!"

t_ch: 很遗憾，翅膀比腿要快。
t_en: Unfortunately, wings are faster than legs.

t_ch: 普尔普冰晶海的尽头，一望无际的银色平原，你将信将疑地在阳光下点亮了捕虫灯。
t_en: At the very end of the Purpu Crystal Ocean there lies an endless silver plain. Still unconvinced, you illuminate the insect trap light under the sun.

t_ch: 「出于分工的需求，这类亚种蛰虫没有趋光性，但它们对热量格外敏感，所以才会以彗星蝉的内脏作为寄生的巢穴。」
t_en: "Due to their need to divide labor, this species of True Sting has no sensitivity to light, but they are extremely sensitive to heat. This is why they use the insides of comet cicadas as their parasitic nests."

t_ch: 你和学士约定分头行动，由你在灯的位置吸引虫群的注意，他则收集信息素的轨迹，构建母体的坐标。
t_en: You and the scholar agree to split up and, as you attract the attention of the Swarm next to the light, he collects the pheromone trail to locate the coordinates of the Swarm mother.

t_ch: 「计划有变，有成年个体向你方向高速前进，马上进入隐蔽！」
t_en: "Change of plans. There are fully grown specimens approaching your location at high speed. Hide, now!"

t_ch: 亢奋的蛰虫振翅掠过海面，恍惚间，极昼的冰雪世界似乎迎来了黑夜。
t_en: The flapping wings of the excited insects whip over the ocean's surface and the ever-bright arctic world around you seems to be plunged into darkness in an instant.

t_ch: 你走在隐蛰虫挖掘的地心洞穴，渗透进岩层的海水滴在肩膀上，带着潮湿的腥臭。沿途飞行的虫子将目光投向你，转头又回到繁忙的搬运工作。
t_en: You walk into the cave leading to the planet's core that was hollowed out by lurking dormant insects, as seawater that has penetrated the rock formations drips onto your shoulders, carrying a dank odor. Passing insects cast their gaze over you before returning to the busy work of transportation.

t_ch: 「模拟信息素，就连塔伊兹育罗斯来了都分不出真假。」同行的学士兴致高昂，让你不由担心，他和虫群哪一个更具危害性。
t_en: "Not even Tayzzyronth could detect whether these simulated pheromones were genuine or not." The scholar by your side is in such high spirits that you can't help but worry if they could be an even greater threat to your safety than the Swarm itself.

t_ch: 在洞穴的底部，沉眠的蠧役嗅到了香气，它与你四目相对，透过那双眼睛，你看到了溶化的血肉，互相啃食的虫子，以及，宛如一粒尘埃的自己。
t_en: In the depths of the cave, the sleeping devourer drone catches your scent and locks eyes with you. In its eyes, you see visions of melted flesh, insects devouring each other, and yourself as no more than a speck of dust.

t_ch: 虫鸣在洞窟中回响，无论人类，彗星蝉还是虫群的子嗣，通通是饱腹的食粮。
t_en: The cries of the insects echo throughout the caves. No matter if you're human, comet cicada, or Swarm pupa, you are no more than food here.

t_ch: 洞窟里有无数的东西在震颤，空气，碎石，还有你的心脏。
t_en: Countless entities are shaking in this cave — the air, the rocks, and your heart.

t_ch: 你身处一片破碎的忆泡中，一琥珀纪一度的千星跳蚤市场正进入最热闹的阶段。在这里，不再需要投影货架和信用点，只要有相中的物品，都能够用以物易物来交换。
t_en: You find yourself in a shattered memory bubble as the once-an-Amber Era galactic flea market reaches its peak period. Here, you don't even need to project a holographic goods shelf or use credits. If you see something you like, you can simply swap goods for other goods.

t_ch: 铺天盖地的航船还未泊停便已易主，向来清修的布雷塔德人，也忙不迭地在身上寻找可以交换的商品。
t_en: Countless ships, their shadows numerous enough to cover the sky, don't even have a chance to dock before they find themselves under new ownership. The habitual ascetics, the Bretadens, also find themselves scouring every surface of their bodies for things that they could possibly trade.

t_ch: 你遇见一位胡子拉碴的吟游诗人，他为你展示古老的布袋，盛满了银河的记忆。
t_en: You come across a bearded poet that shows you an ancient pouch stuffed full of the cosmos' memories.

t_ch: 「故事，请为我讲述一个故事，真假皆可。」诗人说，「然后，我带走你的诗句，你拿走我的歌声。」
t_en: "A story. Please tell me a story. Fact or fiction is fine." Says the poet. "Then, I shall take your verses, and you shall receive my song."

t_ch: 交易是双向的，付出越多，得到也越多。诗人期待地望着你的眼睛，等待你即将分享的故事。
t_en: Deals are mutually beneficial. The higher the price you pay, the more you should expect to receive. The poet looks at you with excitement, awaiting the story you will share.

t_ch: 诗人微微阖眼，你沉没在一片寂静的海洋。音符是它的水滴，歌声是它的流向，故事沿着水流浸入你的胸膛。
t_en: The poet slightly closes his eyes as you sink into a lonely ocean. The notes are the drops of water, the song is its flow and the story follows the rhythm of the waves into your chest.

t_ch: 你看见万年不息的舞蹈，伶人们在贡多拉哭泣，钻石雨从天幕落下。当喧嚣重新回到你的世界，吟游诗人已不见踪影。正如他所言，带走了你的诗句。
t_en: You see a dance that never stops, actors weeping on a gondola, and a rain of diamonds falling from the sky. When the hustle and bustle returns to your world, the poet is nowhere to be seen. Just as he said, he had taken your verses.

t_ch: 讲述惊奇的冒险。
t_en: Describe a wondrous adventure.

t_ch: 讲述朴实的生活。
t_en: Describe a simple life.

t_ch: 讲述多彩的旅途。
t_en: Describe a colorful journey.

t_ch: 交易是双向的，付出越多，得到也越多。诗人期待地望着你的眼睛，等待你即将分享的故事。
t_en: Deals are mutually beneficial. The higher the price you pay, the more you should expect to receive. The poet looks at you with excitement, awaiting the story you will share.

t_ch: 在喧哗的星际百货大楼，一台扭蛋机做作地出现在你的面前。炫彩的灯光，撕心裂肺的音乐和满身的鞋印，足以证明它在这里的受欢迎程度。
t_en: In the bustling Interastral Department Store, a capsule machine coquettishly appears before you. Its dazzling lights, ear-shredding music, and countless shoe prints all over its surface are evident proof of its immense popularity.

t_ch: 「博识学会联名限定版扭蛋，你，值得拥有。」真有人想要这种东西？你把头凑到扭蛋机上，想看看有没有熟人的周边产品。
t_en: "Limited-edition Intelligentsia Guild collab capsules, surely worthy of your possession." Do people actually want this thing? You plant your face against the capsule machine, peering into its contents, to see if it carries merchandise of those familiar to you.

t_ch: 「要不，来两下试试水？」扭蛋机一语道出你的心声。
t_en: "How about it? Try your hand?" The capsule machine speaks out the thoughts in your head.

t_ch: 好吧，你认识的学士加起来两只手都能数清，实在没有为它消费的必要。
t_en: All right. You can count on two hands the number of scholars you know — there is simply no need to spend any cash on it.

t_ch: 扪心自问，这真不是假面愚者的陷阱？
t_en: Just ask yourself: Is this really not some Masked Fool's traps?

t_ch: 学会放弃沉没成本的瞬间，你已经比学会一半的人都要聪明了。
t_en: The instant you learn to let go of the sunk cost is the instant you become smarter than half the Guild members in existence.

t_ch: 杜威特博士的年轻靓照，杜威特博士的发明目录，杜威特博士在求学期间的研究笔记。不管这个杜威特博士是谁，他一定非常自恋。
t_en: Doctor DeWitt's photos in his heyday. Doctor DeWitt's invention catalog. Doctor DeWitt's research journal during his student days... Whoever this Doctor DeWitt is, he sure is narcissistic.

t_ch: 不过，来都来了，不再看看还有哪些人在扭蛋里吗？
t_en: But, since you're already here, might as well see who else is in those capsules?

t_ch: 杜威特博士的警世名言，杜威特博士的笑话与冷笑话全集，杜威特博士给毕业生的寄语。难道博识学会联名款只联名了杜威特博士不成？
t_en: Doctor DeWitt's cautionary maxims. Doctor DeWitt's full collection of jokes and dry jokes. Doctor DeWitt's speech to graduates. What, did the Intelligentsia Guild only use Doctor DeWitt in this collaboration?

t_ch: 冷静，冷静，抽了这么多次，也该出个稀有角色了。要不，咱再试试？
t_en: Calm down. You've already pulled so many times. It's about time a rare character pops up. Why not give it one more twist?

t_ch: 在扭蛋滚下来的瞬间，你已经知道了抽奖的结果。
t_en: You already know what you've got the moment the capsule rolls out.

t_ch: 垃圾扭蛋机，垃圾杜威特博士。
t_en: This garbage capsule machine, and this garbage Doctor DeWitt.

t_ch: 你站在观众席的外围，整张脸都因拥挤趴在防护窗上，真空中的飞船皆蓄势以待，为了在待会儿看清它们的轨迹，在十光年内的陨石圈都布满了传感器。
t_en: You stand along the exterior of the audience seating with your entire face planted on the reinforced screen due to the crowd's density. The ships linger in a ready state in vacuum, and to better follow their traces, all meteorites within <unbreak>10</unbreak> light-years have been filled with sensors.

t_ch: 「智人们智械们，还有头上长满菠萝花的智能植物们，欢迎来到银河星船竞速赛的现场！让我感受到你们的振动好不好？」
t_en: "Wise Intellitrons, and sentient plants with pineapple flowers adorning their heads! Welcome to the Galactic Grand Prix! Let me feel your vibrations!"

t_ch: 随着险些炸烂观众席的爆破迸发，一道道飞光自黑暗的背景中划过。观众们竞相押下筹码，以期选手为他们带来暴富的结局。
t_en: As explosions burst forth, the audience seats narrowly escape destruction and beams of flash split through a dark backdrop. The audience places their bids, hoping that the contestants will bring them great wealth when all is done.

t_ch: 「就这点儿？我库维达星系的姥姥都比你们有追求，」主持人狂热的呼喊几乎让你们融化，「再加注一倍，靠着这艘制霸全赛季的飞船之王，入驻庇尔波因特再也不是梦！」
t_en: "That's it? Even my grandma from the Kuvida System has more ambitions than you." The host's passionate cries almost liquefy you. "Double the stakes. This season-dominating king of ships will ensure that living Pier Point will no longer be just a dream!"

t_ch: 「就这点儿？我养的卡蒂亚蜘蛛都比你们懂投资，」主持人狂热的呼喊几乎让你们融化，「再加注一倍，稳打稳扎的黑马选手，让你从此成为星际人上人！」
t_en: "That's it? Even my pet Katyan Spider has more financial know-how than you." The host's passionate cries almost liquefy you. "Double the stakes. This steady dark horses will make you interstellar elites!"

t_ch: 「就这点儿？我邻居家的节肢类保姆都比你们出手阔绰，」主持人狂热的呼喊几乎让你们融化，「再加注一倍，特立独行的寿司飞船，让你和空荡荡的钱包说再见！」
t_en: "That's it? Even my neighbor's anthropoid nanny spends more money than you." The host's passionate cries almost liquefy you. "Double the stakes. This unique sushi spaceship will spare you from ever being short on credits again!"

t_ch: 受到匿名人士举报，寿司飞船实为一位进行了基因改造的原教旨主义寿司学者。这位巨大的参赛者表示，他在以自身为原料，制造太空军舰寿司。
t_en: An anonymous source complained that the sushi spaceship is actually a genetically modified fundamentalist sushi scholar. This enormous contestant states that he wishes to serve as a sushi spaceship, using himself as the raw material.

t_ch: 由于驾驶员的美食理念与主办方不合，寿司飞船失去了比赛资格。
t_en: Due to culinary disagreements between the pilot and the organizers, the sushi spaceship is disqualified.

t_ch: 受到匿名人士举报，寿司飞船实为一位进行了基因改造的原教旨主义寿司学者。这位巨大的参赛者表示，他在以自身为原料，制造太空军舰寿司。
t_en: An anonymous source complained that the sushi spaceship is actually a genetically modified fundamentalist sushi scholar. This enormous contestant states that he wishes to serve as a sushi spaceship, using himself as the raw material.

t_ch: 由于驾驶员的美食理念与主办方不合，寿司飞船失去了比赛资格。
t_en: Due to culinary disagreements between the pilot and the organizers, the sushi spaceship is disqualified.

t_ch: 你发现赛场的盒饭居然是免费的，于是决定把本钱吃回来。
t_en: You discover the meal box at the competition is empty, so you decide to get your money's worth by feasting.

t_ch: 好一块寿司！以豪情万丈的架势冲过了陨石障碍圈。当其他对手试图干扰它的飞行时，你隐约看到寿司里长出一只巨大的手臂，一拳将对方打得稀碎。
t_en: What a piece of sushi! Watch as it boldly speeds through the meteorite field. When other contestants try to obstruct its flying, you faintly see the sushi grow a massive arm and shatter its foes into splinters.

t_ch: 由于你是唯一闲得没事儿押寿司飞船的，这下你可真是赚大发了。
t_en: Since you are the only one who bid on the sushi spaceship (because you were so bored), you really won big this time.

t_ch: 好一块寿司！以豪情万丈的架势冲过了陨石障碍圈。当其他对手试图干扰它的飞行时，你隐约看到寿司里长出一只巨大的手臂，一拳将对方打得稀碎。
t_en: What a piece of sushi! Watch as it boldly speeds through the meteorite field. When other contestants try to obstruct its flying, you faintly see the sushi grow a massive arm and shatter its foes into splinters.

t_ch: 由于你是唯一闲得没事儿押寿司飞船的，这下你可真是赚大发了。
t_en: Since you are the only one who bid on the sushi spaceship (because you were so bored), you really won big this time.

t_ch: 「诸位好，在下是一团太空军舰寿司。」飞船在领奖时如是说道。
t_en: "Greetings, all. I am a space sushi spaceship." The ship says while receiving the prize.

t_ch: 飞船在原地一动不动，但引擎的火焰却没有消失。
t_en: The ship remains in place, but the flames from its engine just kept burning.

t_ch: 事后检查发现，驾驶员把时间稳定仪设置成了相对模式——外部的世界相对飞船内是亚光速。
t_en: After inspection, it is discovered that the pilot set the temporal stabilizer to Relative Mode, with the cosmos outside the ship considered as sub-light velocity.

t_ch: 飞船在原地一动不动，但引擎的火焰却没有消失。
t_en: The ship remains in place, but the flames from its engine just kept burning.

t_ch: 事后检查发现，驾驶员把时间稳定仪设置成了相对模式——外部的世界相对飞船内是亚光速。
t_en: After inspection, it is discovered that the pilot set the temporal stabilizer to Relative Mode, with the cosmos outside the ship considered as sub-light velocity.

t_ch: 你发现赛场的盒饭居然是免费的，于是决定把本钱吃回来。
t_en: You discover the meal box at the competition is empty, so you decide to get your money's worth by feasting.

t_ch: 你怀疑自己是忘了眨眼，仅仅一个瞬间，飞船便已把同行的对手远远甩在身后，以不到一秒的时间获得了胜利。
t_en: You wonder if you forgot to blink. In just a heartbeat, the ship had already long left its opponents behind and secured victory in less than a second.

t_ch: 由于没几个人押中了这艘飞船，你一下子赚得盆满钵满。
t_en: As not many people placed bids on this ship, you ended up making a massive fortune in an instant.

t_ch: 你怀疑自己是忘了眨眼，仅仅一个瞬间，飞船便已把同行的对手远远甩在身后，以不到一秒的时间获得了胜利。
t_en: You wonder if you forgot to blink. In just a heartbeat, the ship had already long left its opponents behind and secured victory in less than a second.

t_ch: 由于没几个人押中了这艘飞船，你一下子赚得盆满钵满。
t_en: As not many people placed bids on this ship, you ended up making a massive fortune in an instant.

t_ch: 「是虫洞，我在赛道上添加了虫洞！」选手站在台上如此发表获奖感言。
t_en: "It's a wormhole. I added a wormhole to the track!" The contestant proclaims on stage while receiving their reward.

t_ch: 所有或者一无所有，你选择「或者」。
t_en: In the choice between "all or nothing," you chose "or."

t_ch: 飞船在前半程中都保持着压倒性的优势，可就在还差三十光秒就能获胜的时候，却突然开始了减速。
t_en: The ship possessed an overwhelming advantage during the first half of the journey, but when it is <unbreak>30</unbreak> light seconds away from victory, it suddenly begins to slow.

t_ch: 「这假赛打得也太明显了！」观众席骤然躁动起来。
t_en: "This match is so obviously fixed!" The audience starts to become restless.

t_ch: 飞船在前半程中都保持着压倒性的优势，可就在还差三十光秒就能获胜的时候，却突然开始了减速。
t_en: The ship possessed an overwhelming advantage during the first half of the journey, but when it is <unbreak>30</unbreak> light seconds away from victory, it suddenly begins to slow.

t_ch: 「这假赛打得也太明显了！」观众席骤然躁动起来。
t_en: "This match is so obviously fixed!" The audience starts to become restless.

t_ch: 人们在观众席上打成一团，你抽出球棒，面前的暴徒立刻交出钱包，向你跪地求饶。
t_en: The spectators in the stands have started brawling. You pull out your baseball bat, and the thugs before you start to hand over their wallets, dropping to their knees and begging for mercy.

t_ch: 飞船不断地将沿途的光粒子转化为加速能源，以近乎恐怖的速度冲过终点线。
t_en: The spaceship relentlessly converts the photons along its path into acceleration energy, crossing the finishing line at a terrifying speed.

t_ch: 由于大多数人都押中了这艘船，你的收获不能说没有，只能说比空气多一点。
t_en: Since most people bet on that ship, you didn't end up completely empty-handed, just somewhat empty-handed.

t_ch: 飞船不断地将沿途的光粒子转化为加速能源，以近乎恐怖的速度冲过终点线。
t_en: The spaceship relentlessly converts the photons along its path into acceleration energy, crossing the finishing line at a terrifying speed.

t_ch: 由于大多数人都押中了这艘船，你的收获不能说没有，只能说比空气多一点。
t_en: Since most people bet on that ship, you didn't end up completely empty-handed, just somewhat empty-handed.

t_ch: 你听到一个消息，那艘飞船的减速设备好像坏掉了。
t_en: You hear a rumor that the deceleration equipment on the spaceship might be faulty.

t_ch: 「嘿！我在哪？为什么有这么多人在我的脑子里吵架？」在发出疑问的同时，一股深深的愤懑浮现在你的脑海，想要破坏，想要把一切都撕裂。
t_en: "Hey! Where am I? Why are there so many people arguing inside my head?" As you put forth your inquiries, a wave of deep rage surfaces in your cognition, desiring destruction and the ruination of everything.

t_ch: 你现在是一缕意识，一缕完美学者的意识。耳畔博识学会的学者们争论不休，未来，混沌，进化，语言，你听到他们的呢喃，但毫无意义。
t_en: You are now but a thread of consciousness. A thread of consciousness belonging to a perfect scholar. The members of the Intelligentsia Guild clamor ceaselessly next to your ears, arguing about the future, chaos, evolution, and languages. You listen to them murmur on and find their words meaningless.

t_ch: 将学会历史上最优秀学者们提取成数据，凝聚成唯一的模型。最好的可能，他们估测，博识学会的第一位完美学者将会诞生。
t_en: This will be a model created by collecting data from the greatest scholars of the Guild and combining the details together into one. The Intelligentsia Guild estimates that, in the best case scenario, the first perfect scholar of the Intelligentsia Guild will be born.

t_ch: 为首的学士启动实验，于是，新的电流又在意识里泛起。
t_en: As the lead scholar initiates the experiment, a new electric current surfaces within the consciousness.

t_ch: 概念：化约。整个宇宙由最基本的粒子、力等多种要素组成。将它们进行拆分，而后以最小单位开始重组，运算。
t_en: Concept: Transmutation. The universe's is composed of various elements such as the most fundamental particles and forces. Separate them apart, then reorganize and calculate them based on the smallest unit.

t_ch: 同理，尝试对虚数进行相同测算……
t_en: Similarly, we're trying to perform a similar observation and calculation on the Imaginary element...

t_ch: 「瞧，这些分裂的思维单位，就是它开始思考的证明。」学士向众人展示眼前的电子培养皿。
t_en: "Look. These fissured thought units are the proof that it has begun to think." The scholar displays the digital incubator before them to the crowd.

t_ch: 灵感回路，闪过的电讯号与冲动，逻辑，完整的理性个体，抛弃生命的悖论。
t_en: Inspiration Circuits. Flashing electric signals and impulses. Logic. A complete and rational individual who has abandoned life's paradoxes.

t_ch: 结论：应当通过抹消有机生命的方式，纠正宇宙的生命模式。
t_en: Conclusion: The life model of the cosmos should be corrected by the means of eliminating organic lifeforms.

t_ch: 「是谁往里面加入了反有机方程！」学士在匆忙间按下格式化按钮。
t_en: "Who added the Anti-Organic Equation in there!?" The scholar hurriedly presses the formatting button.

t_ch: 语言，认知宇宙的基础。人类将信息解码为语言，存储在大脑中，并以语言作为媒介，完成思考过程。
t_en: Language. The foundation with which to know the universe. Humans decode information into language, store it in their brains, and complete the process of thought with language as the medium.

t_ch: 改变了语言，是否就等于改变了世界？
t_en: If we change language, does that mean we've changed the world?

t_ch: 「第<unbreak>312</unbreak>次失败，可以接受。」学士格式化了失败的电子培养皿。
t_en: "The <unbreak>312</unbreak>th failure. This is acceptable." The scholar formatted the failed electrical incubator.

t_ch: 自我，部分文明为其赋予了「灵魂」的描述。不同个体的自我存在巨大的差异，这一差异决定了个体的运动轨迹，以及思维模式。
t_en: The self. Some civilizations granted it the descriptor of "soul." Selves from different individuals exhibit massive differences. This difference determines the movement patterns and thought processes of the individual.

t_ch: 综上，需要考虑一个问题。
t_en: Therefore, one question must be considered.

t_ch: 「对自我意义的探寻，我想，它在重复成为人类的过程。」学士向众人展示眼前的电子培养皿。
t_en: "The pursuit of the meaning of the self. I believe that it is repeating the process of becoming human." The scholar displays the digital incubator to the crowd.

t_ch: 「终末」的存在，无疑是未来可观测的有力证明。过去无可改变，而未来正是「末王」的过去。故可以推论——未来早已注定。
t_en: The existence of Finality is undoubtedly a powerful proof that the future can be observed. The past cannot be changed, yet the past is Terminus' future. Therefore, it can be deduced that — The future has long been set in stone.

t_ch: 也即，物质不存在意义。
t_en: In other words, matter has no meaning.

t_ch: 「虽然难以置信，但是，它……抹除了自己的数据。」望着空荡荡的电子培养皿，学者耸耸肩。
t_en: "It's hard to believe, but... it erased its own data." The scholar shrugs while looking at the empty digital incubator.

t_ch: 你失足踏入回收站的引力滑道，破烂的机械和废旧零件拥挤作河流，推搡着你向前，从烟囱里落入一个明亮的房间。
t_en: You accidentally step into the gravitational slide of the recycling plant. Broken machines and scrapped parts swarm into a river and push you forward, falling through the chimney into a bright room.

t_ch: 修补匠的胡子上沾满了齿轮和矿渣，他披着冷却恒星做成的斗篷，活像一位魔法师。
t_en: The repairman's beard is covered in small gears and flecks of ore. He's draped in a cloak made from chilled stars, looking like a magician.

t_ch: 「孩子，你有想要的东西吗？」老人不紧不慢地放下手头的塑料玩具，浑浊的眸子温和地望向你，展柜里，重力盘、引擎碎片和白乳胶粘连成千奇百怪的玩具。
t_en: "Is there something you want, child?" The old man unhurriedly puts down the plastic toy in his hands and gently shifts his turbid eyes at you. In the display case, centrifuge chambers and engine fragments and white latex are stuck together into various bizarre toys.

t_ch: 「想要的话，拿走便是。当然，你也可以留下什么，一些用不着的废品。我敢相信，等你再看到它们的时候，一定会大吃一惊。」
t_en: "You can take them if you want it. Well, you can also choose to leave something here. Trash that you no longer have any use for. I promise you that you'll be very surprised when you see them next."

t_ch: 老人微笑着向你道别，宛如道别一位许久未见的朋友。
t_en: The old man waves goodbye to you with a smile, as if you were long-lost friends.

t_ch: 你又一次回到修补匠的工房，仿佛对你的来访早有预料，他将一堆零件整齐地排列在桌上，兴奋地哼着小曲。
t_en: You once again return to the repairman's workshop. As if he had a premonition of your arrival, he lays out a pile of parts neatly on the table as he excitedly hums a little tune.

t_ch: 「世上不存在无用的东西，只有未被发现用处的东西。」
t_en: "There's nothing in this world that has no value. There are only things with value that have not been discovered yet."

t_ch: 「军衔、武器、经费和实验室。所谓有用的东西，如果会带走欢愉，又算什么有用呢？我花了很多年才明白这个道理。」
t_en: "Military titles, weapons, funds, and research labs... Do so-called 'things of value' still have value when they take away joy? It took me many years to understand this."

t_ch: 「记得你留下的废品吗？我把它们做成了新的玩具。你也试试看如何，相信你能做到的。」老人把零件推到你的面前，露出期待的眼神。
t_en: "Do you remember the scraps you left behind? I made them into new toys. Why don't you have a go? I believe you can do it." The old man pushes the parts to you with an expectant look in his eyes.

t_ch: 废弃的零件组装成七扭八歪的玩具，你感觉到，微笑无法抑制地出现在嘴角。
t_en: The discarded parts are combined into misshapen toys, yet you feel a smile controllably creeping up on the ends of your lips.

t_ch: 你在无笑话兽的肚子里奋力游动，漫无边际的冷漠海洋上，由无幽默粒子组成的胃液卷起浪花，呛进你的鼻腔。
t_en: You use every ounce of your strength to swim in the belly of the Jokeless Beast. Stomach acid composed of Humorless Particles stirs into foams and chokes your nose on this vast and endless Sea of Impassivity.

t_ch: 一艘残破的愚人船出现在你面前，它的骨架是简陋的冷笑话，船帆是老套的星际段子，假面愚者高举俚语的酒杯，邀你登船共饮。
t_en: A ragged Ship of Fools appears before you. Its hull is a dingy dry joke, its sails out-of-fashion stellar memes. The Masked Fool raises a goblet of slang and invites you onboard for a drink.

t_ch: 「难怪看不到出口，嗝，原来这船在无笑话兽的肚子里，那群王八蛋…忽悠我海对面是三进制帝国。」他低声思索，像是在同谁交谈。船舱深处传来酒馆的喧嚣，但你无比确信，门后空空如也，只有浮在胃液表面的笑声……
t_en: "No wonder I can't find a way out *hiccup* Turns out this ship is in the belly of the Jokeless Beast. Those scoundrels... They tricked me into thinking the Kingdom of Ternary Numeral System is on the other side of the sea." He contemplates in a low voice, as if speaking to someone. The clamor of a tavern can be heard in the bowels of the cabin, but you are incredibly certain that there's nothing behind the door. Only the laughter floating on the surface of the stomach acid...

t_ch: 「知道在哪儿就简简简单了。」醉意未除的愚者走向船尾，面具在顷刻间反复变换，骤然加速的愚人船在胃液上激起巨浪。
t_en: "It gets e-e-easy once I know where we are." The still inebriated Fool walks towards the stern. His mask switches repeatedly in the blink of an eye. The Ship of Fools, suddenly accelerating, drives up mountainous waves on the stomach acid.

t_ch: 「哦，忘记说说说了，这艘船的转向得靠笑话来完成，嗝，你想要要要听什么样的笑话？」远处的猩红色山峦逐渐向你逼近，在这艘船一头撞进胃壁前，你最好真的让这醉鬼讲出点什么。
t_en: "Oh, I forgot to t-t-tell you. You need to tell a joke to get this ship to turn *hiccup*. What kinda j-j-joke do you wanna hear?" The carmine mountain ranges in the distance gradually loom near. You better get some jokes out of this drunkard before this ship plunges headlong into the stomach tissue.

t_ch: 「有趣的同僚。」愚者的身形跟着船体震荡摆动，「花色的面具，一场全宇宙的舞会，当然，是以游戏的形式，沿着以太网络，笑声传播的速度就像病毒。」
t_en: "Fun comrades." The figure of the Fool shivers and wobbles with the ship. "Multicolored masks. A ball for the entire universe. Of course, it's in the form of a game. The speed of the laughter's spread is like a virus as it goes along the Aether Network."

t_ch: 「我喜欢这家伙，谁能说，明目张胆的笑话就不能算笑话呢？」
t_en: "I like this guy. Who ever said an in-your-face joke isn't a joke?"

t_ch: 古板食人鲨啃掉了甲板上的冷笑话，全都变成了冰冻食人鲨。阴暗的天空正在逐渐变得明亮，星光透过无笑话兽的排热孔洒在海面上。
t_en: The dull man-eating shark munched off the dry jokes on the deck and all turned into dry man-eating sharks. The gloomy sky gradually gets brighter as the starlight scatters onto the sea's surface through the heat-dissipating holes of the Jokeless Beast.

t_ch: 就是那儿！让愚者做出最后的转向。
t_en: Right there! Get the Fool to make the final turn there.

t_ch: 「口味激烈的藏品。」愚者因醉意已沉沉欲睡，「纯白的完整面具，谎言并非愚者的专属，有清闲的人漂泊在宇宙里，戳穿华丽的泡沫。」
t_en: "Sharp-tasting collections." The Fool is dozing off in his drunkenness. "Pristine white complete masks. Lies are not the unique properties of Fools. Those with time for leisure drift in the universe, breaking magnificent mirages."

t_ch: 「比如告诉塔拉克人，他们的皇帝在做什么。或者给移植了丰饶民心脏的政客们来一次大曝光。他们常说真相至上，可当真相浮出水面时，却哭得像个悲悼伶人。」
t_en: "For example, tell the Taraka people what their emperor is doing, or have a grand expose of politicians who have transplanted a heart from the Denizens of Abundance into their body. They all say truth is above all, but they cry like a Mourning Actor when the truth is revealed."

t_ch: 再也忍受不了笑话的无笑话兽终于爆发，它的胃溃疡卷起滔天的海浪，连人带船一并给你们抛进了太空。
t_en: The Jokeless Beast can't take these jokes any longer and finally retaliates. Its stomach ulcer stirs up colossal waves and throws you and the ship into outer space.

t_ch: 「真是个不好笑的笑话。」愚者笑道。
t_en: "What an unfunny joke," the Fool laughs.

t_ch: 「这可是我的珍藏。」愚者大笑，「青面獠牙的面具，在疯王卡利的王国里掀起了一场暴乱，在那个只有高举宝剑的孩子才能进入的王国，猜猜她干了什么？」
t_en: "This is my treasure." The Fool roars in laughter. "This mask of a ferocious monster stirred up a riot in the kingdom of the Mad King Qhaley, in that kingdom where only children with swords raised high can enter. Guess what she did?"

t_ch: 「她哄骗那些小孩儿，告诉他们，长大比童年更美好！哈哈哈哈哈哈，嗝。」
t_en: "She lied to those children and told them that being a grown-up is better than childhood! Ahahahaha *hiccup*."

t_ch: 愚人船一个急转弯，在胃液上打出不完美的水漂。你转头看向掌舵的愚者，这一颠一颤似乎让酒精在他的大脑里开起了派对，他狂笑着，将船驶向古板食人鲨的领域。
t_en: The Ship of Fools takes a sharp turn and skids imperfectly over the stomach acid. You turn your head to look at the Fool at the helm. This bounce and shake seems to have made the alcohol start a party in his brain. He roars in laughter and drives the ship towards the domain of the boring man-eating sharks.

t_ch: 快！让他再讲个笑话！
t_en: Get him to tell another joke! Quickly!

t_ch: 「品味不错，朋友。」愚者大笑，「黄金熔铸的面具，贸易中转星域塔列，如果你读过银河经济史，就应该认识他，拍卖了塔列<unbreak>12</unbreak>％的重力，和<unbreak>51</unbreak>％强互作用力，嗝。」
t_en: "Your tastes ain't bad, friend." The Fool roars in laughter. "A mask cast from gold. The commercial logistic hub, stellar region Tarle. You should know him if you've read Cosmic economic history. He auctioned off <unbreak>12%</unbreak> of Tarle's gravity and <unbreak>51%</unbreak> of its strong nuclear force *hiccup*."

t_ch: 「全宇宙的商人都巴不得把他抽筋扒皮，可那滑稽的拍卖行就开在他们的眼皮底下。」
t_en: "Businessmen from across the universe want to flay the hide from his flesh, but that ridiculous auction house is set up right under their noses."

t_ch: 愚人船一个急转弯，在胃液上打出不完美的水漂。你转头看向掌舵的愚者，这一颠一颤似乎让酒精在他的大脑里开起了派对，他狂笑着，将船驶向古板食人鲨的领域。
t_en: The Ship of Fools takes a sharp turn and skids imperfectly over the stomach acid. You turn your head to look at the Fool at the helm. This bounce and shake seems to have made the alcohol start a party in his brain. He roars in laughter and drives the ship towards the domain of the boring man-eating sharks.

t_ch: 快！让他再讲个笑话！
t_en: Get him to tell another joke! Quickly!

t_ch: 「这位可有意思。」愚者的身形跟着船体震荡摆动，「绯红的面具，假扮作他人混入其间。演员可不是个简单工作，面具戴得太久，没准儿就再也摘不下来了。」
t_en: "This one is really interesting." The figure of the Fool shakes and swings with the ship. "A scarlet mask. Infiltrating via disguise. Being an actor is not an easy job. If you wear a mask for too long, maybe you'll never be able to take it off."

t_ch: 「宇宙就是一场戏剧！谁能保证，自己不是在舞台上表演？」
t_en: "The universe is a big play! Who can guarantee that they are not performing onstage?"

t_ch: 古板食人鲨啃掉了甲板上的冷笑话，全都变成了冰冻食人鲨。阴暗的天空正在逐渐变得明亮，星光透过无笑话兽的排热孔洒在海面上。
t_en: The dull man-eating shark munched off the dry jokes on the deck and all turned into dry man-eating sharks. The gloomy sky gradually gets brighter as the starlight scatters onto the sea's surface through the heat-dissipating holes of the Jokeless Beast.

t_ch: 就是那儿！让愚者做出最后的转向。
t_en: Right there! Get the Fool to make the final turn there.

t_ch: 「苦涩忧闷的藏品。」愚者因醉意已沉沉欲睡，「灰暗的破碎面具，信用为负数的说谎者，那人说暴胀子引擎才是库维达能源的出路，可就连智能单元都不愿意相信。」
t_en: "A bitter and depressed collection item." The Fool is dozing off in his drunkenness. "The dim and broken mask. A liar with negative credit. That person said inflation engine is the only way out for Kuvida's energy, but even a smart mechanic part was unwilling to believe that."

t_ch: 「后面的事我们都知道了，库维达星云在核心失控后成为死域。如果你的每句话都被视为谎言，真实就会替代谎言的价值。」
t_en: "We know what happened after. Kuvida Nebula became a dead zone after the core went out of control. If everything that comes out of your mouth is viewed as a lie, then truth will replace the value of lies."

t_ch: 再也忍受不了笑话的无笑话兽终于爆发，它的胃溃疡卷起滔天的海浪，连人带船一并给你们抛进了太空。
t_en: The Jokeless Beast can't take these jokes any longer and finally retaliates. Its stomach ulcer stirs up colossal waves and throws you and the ship into outer space.

t_ch: 「真是个不好笑的笑话。」愚者笑道。
t_en: "What an unfunny joke," the Fool laughs.

t_ch: 你置身于一座破败的王城，钢铁荆棘缠绕住圣殿，失去供能的纳米机群不再喘息，仅映射出两个太阳的霞光。
t_en: You find yourself in a dilapidated royal city. Here, steel thorns wind around the sacred temple, while swarms of nanomachines depleted of their power source lie dormant, merely reflecting the radiant glow of the two suns.

t_ch: 你向着圣殿的方向进发。巨大的门扉上刻画着古老的嗔王，伯伦格星之主。被假面愚者欺骗后，嗔王用法令杀死了疆域内所有的笑声。
t_en: You head toward the sacred temple. The colossal door is engraved with a portrait of the Wrath King, the sovereign of Planet Behrenger. Deceived by the Masked Fools, the Wrath King issued a decree that silenced all laughter within his kingdom.

t_ch: 大门上残留着武装考古学派的爆破痕迹，可即便王已风化，缄默之殿的熵增限制装置仍恒久运行。
t_en: The door has been blasted open by the Armed Archaeologists' explosives, but even in the wake of the King's demise, the entropy-limiting device within the Temple of Reticence persists in perpetual operation.

t_ch: 「面见嗔王者，必献上其愤怒。」你将目光投向铭文，思考其中的意味。
t_en: "Whoever has an audience with the King shall offer their wrath." You set your eyes on the inscription, grasping the significance it conveys.

t_ch: 这么诡异的地方，万一放出只星际老僵尸可就糟了。
t_en: It would be troublesome if an ancient interstellar zombie were to be unleashed in such an eerie place.

t_ch: 「此地禁止欢笑。」你听到一阵阵吟唱，海浪般的祈祷令你浑身发麻。
t_en: "Laughter is forbidden here." Waves of chanting reach your ears, prayers that send a shiver down your spine.

t_ch: 「此地禁止欢笑。」你不信邪地放声大笑，但声音在出口的瞬间便逸散无踪。
t_en: "Laughter is forbidden here." You defiantly burst into laughter, yet the sound dissipates into nothingness the moment it escapes your lips.

t_ch: 你砸碎手中的奇物，破坏的欲望和愤怒从你心中泛起，地面上传来微弱的震颤。眨眼间，钢铁的大门已向你敞开。
t_en: As the urge for destruction and wrath surge within your heart, you shatter the Curio in your hand. A faint tremor courses through the ground, and in the blink of an eye, the steel gate swings open before you.

t_ch: 你坐在幽暗的帐篷里，白发的卜者挥挥手，游离的色彩便将迪斯普夜市的嘈杂隔绝。漆黑的眸子在你的身上游走，似乎这样就能窥探到你的命运。
t_en: As you sit inside the dim tent, the white-haired diviner waves her hand, prompting the meandering colors to block out the clamor of the Dispo Night Market outside. Her dark eyes scrutinize you, seemingly peering into your fate.

t_ch: 「未来，无数人想要窥探它的样貌，却又在得到后追悔莫及。」她轻呼出斑斓的气息，像一条深海蠕虫，将你缠绕在其中。
t_en: "The future... Many long to behold it, but often rue the sight." Her breath is soft yet captivating, coiling around you like a deep-sea worm.

t_ch: 「占卜命运，不过是骗人的把戏。但我不一样，我能为你决定自己的命运。」她从袖口中凭空摸出一副奥塔牌，抽出一叠，正面摆放在你的面前。
t_en: "Divination is nothing but deceitful tricks, but I am different. I hold the power to shape your destiny." Drawing a deck of Tawot Cards from her sleeve, she pulls out a stack and places them face up before you.

t_ch: 「只需用『谜语』稍微撩拨看待事物的角度，世界便会因你而改变模样。」女人微微一笑，消散在夜市的琴声里。
t_en: "With a subtle shift in perspective through 'riddles,' the world will alter its form around you." The woman offers a faint smile before vanishing into the music of the night market.

t_ch: 「如此追求未来的『神秘』感，或许有一天，你也会成为我们的一员。」女人微微一笑，消散在夜市的琴声里。
t_en: "You seem to harbor a strong yearning for the mysteries of the future. Perhaps one day you may become one of us." The woman offers a faint smile before vanishing into the music of the night market.

t_ch: 你站在无敌号的甲板上，舰船在水面荡起涟漪。骇客水手们用以太编辑为载具包裹上层层泡沫，竞相向着数据海洋的暗面前进。
t_en: You stand on the deck of the Invincible Voyager, watching the rippling waves on the surface of the water caused by the ship. The hacker sailors envelop the vessel in foam with aether editing, steering directly toward the dark side of the data ocean.

t_ch: 你不甘示弱地迎头赶上，庞大的数据流渗透进泡沫，侵蚀数据风的舰船。一条紫色的狮子鱼游到你的面前，你惊恐地退后，在被毒刺扎中前，将它还原为代码。
t_en: As you also press forward, massive data streams infiltrate the foam, a data storm that corrodes the vessel. A purple lionfish swims before you. Startled, you step back, promptly turning it back into code before its poisonous spines reach you.

t_ch: 在朋克洛德的暗网中，光这串0和1的数字组合，就能换来你一个月的设备维修费用。你望向幽深的海底，试图在可能性和见好就收里做出抉择。
t_en: In the dark web of Punklorde, this mere number combination of 0s and 1s is equivalent to an entire month's worth of equipment maintenance fees. You gaze into the unfathomable ocean, torn between the allure of vast opportunities and the peril of tempting fate.

t_ch: 早安，朋克洛德！你们即将迎来一个新的传奇！
t_en: Good morning, Punklorde! You shall soon embrace a new legend!

t_ch: 加油，年轻的骇客，相信你会有成功的那天！
t_en: Keep persevering, young hacker. Your triumph will come one day!

t_ch: 一团垃圾数据以极高的速度与舰船碰撞在一起，渗透的代码撕裂你的载具，同化负载的数据。在自己被拽进黑暗深处前，你不舍地按下了紧急弹射按钮。
t_en: A cluster of junk data collides with the ship at a rapid pace. The infiltrating code tears your vessel apart, assimilating the data it carries. Just before being dragged into the depths of darkness, you reluctantly activate the emergency eject button.

t_ch: 当你重新睁开眼，自己已经与舰船的残骸一起，搁浅在数据海洋的边缘。
t_en: Upon opening your eyes again, you find yourself stranded on the edge of the data ocean alongside the wreckage of the ship.

t_ch: 留得键盘在，不怕没代码敲。作为朋克洛德第一精致的骇客，你显然不会被这些蝇头小利蒙蔽双眼。
t_en: There is always more code to be written as long as you still have your keyboard. As the most exceptional hacker in Punklorde, these trivial gains clearly won't sway your resolve.

t_ch: 你掂量了下自己的劳动成果，两串代码如同宝石般在袋里熠熠生辉。
t_en: You feel the weight of your own work in your hand, the two strings of code gleaming like gems within the bag.

t_ch: 你轻轻地抚摸着歌鸲的尾巴，羽毛里藏着一位传奇骇客的秘密。
t_en: Tenderly, you stroke the songbird's tail, within the feathers concealing the secret of a fabled hacker.

t_ch: 你断开大脑内的联网装置，摆脱深层数据的影响，趁着意识清醒的片刻回归现实。
t_en: You disengage the network device within your brain, liberating yourself from the grip of deep data and returning to reality before slipping into unconsciousness.

t_ch: 你驾驶舰船向上加速，赶在它被撕裂前，回到朋克洛德相对友好的一面。
t_en: You hasten the ship's pace, steering it back to the comparatively hospitable side of Punklorde before it succumbs to destruction.

t_ch: 你驶入一团废弃的历史数据。在这里，你是黄柑橘星云的舰队前锋，驾驶着需要十只触角操控的意识融合式飞船，在敌人的蜂群浮游炮中来回游走。
t_en: You navigate into a cluster of deserted historical data. Here, you assume the role of the fleet vanguard of the Yellow Citrus Nebula, who pilots a consciousness-integrated airship that requires ten tentacles for control, deftly maneuvering through swarms of enemy floating cannons.

t_ch: 你撞开敌军的护卫圈，伪装的智能代码试图躲进旗舰的引擎，却被你的捕捉足钳制，带回数据外的舰船。重新回到灵长类的躯体，实在是无比怀念。
t_en: You breach the enemy's defensive encirclement. The disguised smart code attempts to hide itself within the ship's engine, only to be captured by you and brought back to the ship beyond the data. The sensation of returning to your human form is truly comforting.

t_ch: 你还要继续下潜吗？
t_en: Do you want to continue diving?

t_ch: 一颗子弹在你的耳畔炸开，涂鸦的数据四溅，又被重新编码为炸药。你堪堪躲开杀手的追击，这部经典电影的每一幕都被你记在脑子里。
t_en: A bullet blasts by your ear. The graffiti data splatters everywhere, before being quickly programmed into explosives again. You narrowly escape the relentless pursuit of the assassin. Every frame of this timeless movie is etched into your memory.

t_ch: 下一个分镜，背叛者5号会打开她的炉心散热，你夺走她的义眼，那是意识寄居的本体。谁会把代码藏进一盘沉入海里的老电影？你感到自己正逐渐适应这片未知的海域。
t_en: In the upcoming scene, Traitor No. 5 will expose her Furnace Core to disperse the heat. You will take away her prosthetic eye, where her consciousness resides. Who would hide code within an old movie that sank into the ocean? You sense yourself gradually adapting to these unfamiliar waters.

t_ch: 你还要继续下潜吗？
t_en: Do you want to continue diving?

t_ch: 你掉进粉色的果冻里，嘴角残留着蓝丝绒的味道。你挪动身子，四肢变得七倒八斜，像只哈哈镜里的水母，扭动的空心面条。
t_en: You sink into pink jelly, the taste of blue velvet still lingering on your palate. As you move your body, you find your limbs twisted like a jellyfish in a funhouse mirror and as crooked as macaroni.

t_ch: 你向着晶体单元的外围走去，三进制帝国对二进制的征讨已经失败，人人都沉浸在恐惧当中。一只二进制的彗尾歌鸲从头顶掠过，你向它吹了个口哨，代码便乖乖落到指尖。
t_en: You walk toward the periphery of the crystal unit. Following the Ternary Empire's unsuccessful conquest against the Binary Kingdom, fear permeates everyone's heart. When a binary intellitail songbird flies overhead, you whistle at it, compelling the code to obediently descend onto your fingertips.

t_ch: 你还要继续下潜吗？
t_en: Do you want to continue diving?

t_ch: 据说，传奇骇客「零号」在离开前，将一串足以改变世界的代码留在了这片海洋的深处。但从未有人找到过它的踪迹。
t_en: Legend has it that the fabled hacker known as Zero left behind a code string potent enough to shake the world, hidden in the depths of this ocean, yet no one has been able to uncover any traces of it.

t_ch: 以太编辑的航船抵达了它的承载极限，但你已无意再寻找他的宝藏。
t_en: The vessel of aether editing has reached its maximum capacity, yet your interest in seeking out his treasure has waned.

t_ch: 你证明了自己作为传奇的实力，还有身为骇客的勇气。
t_en: You have demonstrated both your prowess as a legend and your courage as a hacker.

t_ch: 多股洋流在这里交汇，滋生出混乱的乐园。你骑着变异鼻行兽在巨型蛰虫的背上狂奔，头戴面具的拟态猎豹在直立行走后和白鹭牵手跳舞。
t_en: Multiple currents converge here, giving rise to a paradise of chaos. You ride a mutant Nosewalker, racing atop a Giant Sting. A masked mimicry cheetah walks upright and holds hands with an egret to engage in a dance.

t_ch: 你的四肢被空间延长，路过的青虫就要啃掉它们。但它们又被一只飞鸟叼走，留下一瓶透明的墨水。你打开瓶盖，绿洲区企业的非法历史将它染上黑色。
t_en: Your limbs are extended by the space, and they are almost nibbled by the passing insects. Yet, a bird swoops in to carry them away, leaving behind a vial of transparent ink. When you open it, the illicit history of corporations in the Oasis Zone stains it in black.

t_ch: 你还要继续下潜吗？
t_en: Do you want to continue diving?

t_ch: 你盘腿端坐在软垫上，与半人半蛇的店长四目相对。第<unbreak>99</unbreak>届不眨眼比赛已进入了白热化阶段，就连河童的两个酒友都不禁捂住嘴巴，生怕影响了这场惊天动地的对决。
t_en: You sit cross-legged on the cushion as you lock eyes with the half-human half-snake shop owner. The excitement of the <unbreak>99</unbreak>th Staring Contest is reaching its peak. Even the water demon's two drinking buddies can't help but cover their mouths, for fear they would disturb this world-shattering showdown.

t_ch: 在现场维持秩序的狛犬警官，紧张地大口吃起了狗粮。被它拷住的暴走族少年，也不禁为比赛捏了一把汗。
t_en: The lion-dog officer assigned to maintain order on the scene is nervously chowing down on dog food. Even the biker gang youth they cuffed under arrest is sweating over the contest.

t_ch: 「投降吧，小家伙。别说是在商店街，就是整个拉夫卡迪奥，能在比赛中胜过妾身的，也是屈指可数。」店长发出恐吓声，分叉的信子近乎要触碰到你的眼睛。
t_en: "Give it up, young one. There are scant few in the Lafcadio — and fewer still in this Shopping Street — who can defeat me in this contest." The shop owner makes a threatening sound and her forked tongue almost touches your eyes.

t_ch: 「嘶嘶，可不要太得意，一妖更比一妖高。」店长笑着吐出信子，「妾身只是不眨眼四天王里最弱的那个。」
t_en: "Hiss... Don't get too cocky now. There is always a stronger opponent," the shop owner laughs and flicks her forked tongue. "I am the weakest among the Four Unblinking Kings."

t_ch: 虽然嘴巴很硬。但你感觉自己的眼球正在与弥奥星的沙漠重叠，与所有的水分子告别。
t_en: You're stubborn but you can feel your eyes becoming the desert of Planet Mio as they part ways with all water molecules.

t_ch: 你瞪大眼珠子，试图用目光刺痛对手的眸子。两双眼睛如同上等的观赏金鱼，在空气中凸起，就差从眼眶里蹦出来，像陨石般相互碰撞。
t_en: You widen your eyes, trying to hurt your opponent's pupils with your gaze. Two pairs of eyes protrude in the air like the finest ornamental goldfish, almost popping out of their eye sockets to collide with each other like meteorites.

t_ch: 「呼，妾身认输了。」店长痛苦地闭上眼睛。顷刻间，所有的人类和妖怪都在为你的胜利欢呼。作为今年的冠军，你将获得第一个品尝糖果店限量商品的机会！
t_en: "Gah, I surrender." The shop owner painfully closes her eyes. In that moment, every human and monster cheers for your victory. As this year's champion, you get the chance to be the first to taste all limited-edition products in the candy store!

t_ch: 为了人类的荣耀！
t_en: For the glory of humanity!

t_ch: 抱歉，我没听清。
t_en: Sorry, I didn't catch that.

t_ch: 你走进阿蒂纳星的餐馆，过时的炫彩灯牌里，狗和愚者不得入内的告示正缓慢旋转。一条没尾巴的金鱼坐在盘子上，凸起的鱼眼转动，为你选择合适的味觉体验。
t_en: You enter a restaurant on Planet Adina. An old-fashioned sign in dazzling colors slowly rotates while informing patrons that dogs and Fools are not allowed entry. A tailless goldfish sits on a plate, its protruding fish eyes rotating as it chooses a taste experience that suits you.

t_ch: 「烹饪美食，品味人生。一场仙舟风味的宴席，就比那幻戏更值得在舌尖斟酌。」金鱼的喉咙里发出咕噜噜的异响。
t_en: "Gourmet cooking grants a sampling of life. A banquet of Xianzhou flavors is more worthy of your tongue's consideration than a showing of immersia." The goldfish makes a strange gurgling sound in its throat.

t_ch: 你嗅到包厢中飘溢的清香，饭前的开胃小菜，带有三分稚嫩的青春，三分萦绕的香料，和四分余温尚存的植物纤维。
t_en: You catch the sweet smell of appetizers wafting in the private room, carrying three parts tender youth, three parts lingering spices, and four parts plant fiber that's still warm.

t_ch: 夹杂着过往的小菜落入口中，浸透味蕾，你的感官逐渐与舌尖上的刺激重合。你身披制式的盔甲，向前踏出一步，接受你身为云骑的使命。
t_en: As you put the appetizer mixed with the past into your mouth, it soaks into your taste buds. The stimulation on the tip of your tongue overlaps with your senses. You are donned in standard armor as you take a step forward to embrace your calling as a Cloud Knight.

t_ch: 你提起一百分的警惕，将长枪对准祸乱人间的妖邪和孽物。
t_en: Fully vigilant, you raise your lance toward the demons and abominations sowing chaos in the world.

t_ch: 你拾起一百分的耐心，替工匠们维护现场的秩序与安定。
t_en: Fully patient, you maintain order and stability for the craftsmen on-site.

t_ch: 你将将从酸甜的迷梦中醒来，第二道菜便被端上了餐桌。在开胃后，辅以另一段人生。你望向包厢对侧的眼睛，它将你包裹在七千秒的记忆里，令意识向着蘸碟里沉没。
t_en: As you wake up from the sweet yet sour unrealizable dream, the second course has been served to your table. After whetting your appetite, you're supplemented with another life. You look at the eyes across the room, and it bundles you up in <unbreak>7,000</unbreak> seconds of memory, sinking your consciousness into the plate of sauce.

t_ch: 漫天火星如雨点滑落，一艘星槎与坠落的轨迹相交，在被舌尖的美味包裹前，天空中无数只圆睁的金鱼眼睛向你露出笑意。
t_en: Sparks cover the sky and fall from it like rain. A starskiff intersects with a falling trajectory. As you're wrapped up in the delicious flavor on the tip of your tongue, the innumerable bulging goldfish eyes dotting the sky all smile at you.

t_ch: 你从恍惚中回过神，握紧手中的武器。接下来的任务十分凶险，身为云骑的小队队长，你和队员们纷纷严阵以待。
t_en: You snap out of your daze and tightly grip the weapon in your hands. The next mission is very dangerous. As the squad leader of the Cloud Knights, you and your team lie in wait.

t_ch: 这伙妖人宣称自己是天生神力，从未染指寿瘟——能先把背后的丹炉藏起来吗？
t_en: This sorcerer claims to be born with the power of gods and has never been touched by the plague. He could at least hide the elixir crucible on his back first.

t_ch: 眼前的金人大喊着什么金人少年不会受伤，金人也要恋爱之类的胡话。总之，先制服它再说吧。
t_en: The aurumaton before you is shouting some nonsense about unbreakable aurumatons and how they can fall in love too. Either way, it's best to subdue it first.

t_ch: 松软的口感，你咽下美好的旧忆。店长的鳍拍打在空气上，最后一道主菜已盛放上桌。
t_en: You swallow beautiful old memories. They have a spongy texture. The owner of the restaurant slaps the air with their fins. The final course is served to your table.

t_ch: 细小的火蛇燎烤其中的佐料，层层连绵的山峦如屏风遮挡住香酥下的软糯，欲拒还迎。你化作轻风拂过冷却的战场，飘至云海之间。
t_en: Among the seasoning of the small roasted fire serpent, unending layers of mountain ranges shield the soft and chewy texture beneath the crisp-fried surface like a protective screen. You want to refuse yet embrace it anyway. You transform into a breeze and drift across a cooling battlefield until you float among a sea of clouds.

t_ch: 事隔经年，曾经的年轻人已是闻名一方的云骑骁卫。你偷得片刻清闲，在长乐天饮下半碗浓茶。可长路漫漫，你仍有使不完劲儿想要发挥，你要做仙舟上响当当的英雄！
t_en: After many years, the once-young man has become a famous Cloud Knight Lieutenant. Having stolen a moment of leisure, you down half a bowl of tea in the Exalting Sanctum. But the road ahead is long, and you still have unspent energy you yearn to put to use. You want to become a well-known hero on the Xianzhou!

t_ch: 你一路过关斩将，看着对手的锋刃，你知道，这又将是一段值得品味的人生。
t_en: You continue to surmount all obstacles in your way. As you look upon your opponents' swords, you know that this is also another life worth sampling.

t_ch: 你背起行囊，走进曜青仙舟的港口，一段新的人生即将等待你去品味。
t_en: You hoist your luggage onto your shoulder and walk into the port of the Xianzhou Yaoqing, where a new life for sampling awaits.

t_ch: 在盗贼公国的废墟里，你被一台星际和平公司的自动售货机拦住了去路。虽然它并没有眼睛，但你确信，此刻，这台售货机正孤零零、惨兮兮、可怜巴巴地望着你。
t_en: You are stopped by an IPC vending machine in the ruins of the Kingdom of Banditry. It does not have eyes, but you are certain that this vending machine is looking at you with a lonely, miserable, and piteous gaze right at this very moment.

t_ch: 作为塔利亚地区唯一的销售员，它以全年负销量的业绩高居销售部榜底。原因无他，这里客户在购物时，从来都不会付钱。
t_en: As the only salesperson in the Talia region, it ranks at the very bottom of the sales department's charts because of its negative sales volume all year. There is only one reason for this: The customers here never pay when they buy anything.
